venue: Wind Creek Steel Stage at PNC Plaza
description: Grupo Niche is a Colombian salsa orchestra formed in 1979 widely recognized by critics and audiences alike as one of the most successful Latin music groups over the last four decades. In 1990, Jairo Varela produced “Cielo de Tambores,” the group's most successful album. Songs like “Una Aventura,” “Busca por Dentro,” “Se parecido tanto a ti,” “Sin Sentimiento,” “Cali Ají” and “Debiera Olvidarla” broke new ground and were undeniably successful throughout Latin America. From their humble beginnings in 1979 to their international acclaim, Grupo Niche has shared the joy and energy of their culture through every note and every rhythm. Their music reflects their history and their commitment to bring it to every corner of the world, with hearts full of pride for their roots. Over the years, the group has received numerous accolades, including nominations at both the Latin Grammy Awards and Anglo Grammy Awards in 2016, wins at both ceremonies in 2020, additional Latin Grammy wins in 2023 and Anglo Grammy Award nominations in 2026. description: World | Cumbia | Punk Mariposas Galácticas is an 8-piece Cumbia Klezmer Punk band based in Philly. Combining band members' South American and Jewish ancestries, the band creates a unique diasporic sound that gets audiences everywhere dancing with rebellious joy. By honoring their Indigenous Andean musical heritage, blended together with punkified ancient Jewish melodies, the band plays a mixture of original and classic tunes that span different languages, cultures, and genres. Mariposas have collaborated with international acts like Os Mutantes, Son Rompe Pera and Kumbia Queers, and they continue to accompany their communities' struggle for liberation everywhere from prominent stages to cultural, activist and community spaces.

description: Latin | Rock | Tribute Rumbaile's music includes a high-energy blend of Caribbean, popular pop, and Latin rock. The band also performs a tribute to the legendary guitarist Carlos Santana. The band has performed at international organizations, festivals, concerts, and private parties in New Jersey, Pennsylvania, New York, and other states. With a unique blend of Latin rhythms and pop beats, Rumbaile creates a dynamic and unforgettable experience for audience of all ages. The band performs songs in Spanish, Portuguese, and English and their sound is reminiscent of Buena Vista Social Club, Marc Anthony, Tito Puente, Carlos Santana, Selena, Celia Cruz, Juanes, Juan Luis Guerra, and other popular artists. The band members' diverse origins from different Latin American countries contribute to their authentic and rich sound that are unique in this style of music.

Whether lighting up dancefloors with his funky, all-vinyl, sets on 45s or blessing a hungry festival crowd with the latest and greatest it is safe to say that you will love this DJs selections.

Folk | Americana | Classic The "Keith, John & Sue" group has performed together in the Lehigh Valley 35 years. Past concert performances include Musikfest, Christkindlmarkt, Martin on Main, Moravian College, and many Lehigh Valley area schools. Keith Quelet is the group's original songwriter; he taught music in the Bethlehem Area School District 26 years. John Christie taught in the Allentown School District 36 years and plays for various bands in the area. Sue Christie is an accomplished vocalist with a long career in music performance. Bass player, Jim Schneck, adds his signature sound on recordings and in concert. Guest musician, Paul Quelet, is an accomplished Keyboardist from Maryland, who has played for various national music groups.The "Keith, John & Sue" music group has released 2 albums of original music. Country | Rock | Americana Scott Marshall is a Popular Record Breaking & Multi-Award Winning Singer/ Songwriter, Recording Artist & Entertainer from Eastern PA's Lehigh Valley. Scott delivers his own blended brand of Americana music with both authority & conviction. No matter what road life has you on, whether he's performing as a duo, trio, or with his full cast of stellar musicians he refers to as "The Highway Souls", Scott takes you on a ride that delivers all the elements needed for an honest to goodness, fun & meaning filled, foot stomping, soul shaking & hand clapping good time. Every mile you go, there are good times to be had, tough times to get through, lessons to be learned & blessings to be discovered & shared. With lots of faith, hope, music & love, Scott's music & performances take you exactly where you need to go, at just the right time & speed.

Vocals feature artists ranging from Johnny Cash to Billy Joel, including sing-a-long covers. Dan travels across the state of PA, playing events at various venues for the corporate and association markets, as well as numerous social events. Dan tends to stay in the tri-state area, but he's always up for an adventure!

description: Multi-Platinum chart-topper and Triple Tigers entertainer Russell Dickerson is no stranger to the grind. The country headliner first broke through by wearing his heart on his sleeve, launching a string of five deeply romantic No. 1 hits—“Yours” (3X Platinum), “Blue Tacoma” (2X Platinum), “Love You Like I Used To” (2X Platinum), “Every Little Thing” (Platinum), and “God Gave Me a Girl.” He followed that success with the slinky, soul-infused “She Likes It” (with Jake Scott) (2X Platinum), further showcasing his genre-blending style. Often inspired by his happy home life, they powered a rise which now includes 3 Billion career streams, industry-wide accolades and a solid reputation for lyrical brilliance, rooted in feel-good reflection and paired a good-natured grin. But what fans of his singles couldn't always see was Dickerson's fiery, sold-out tour showmanship. That changes with his highly anticipated fourth studio album, FAMOUS BACK HOME. Blending the tender family man with the wild-eyed performer from his SOLD-OUT RUSSELLMANIA TOUR 2025, the project marks a new era of confidence and creative range. Leading with the dance-floor-ready single “Happen to Me,” a seize-the-moment rocker full of sonic swagger, landed on the Billboard Hot 100—and scored his biggest streaming debut week yet. FAMOUS BACK HOME delivers a bold blend of country-soul, ‘80s rock, and modern pop—pushing sonic boundaries while keeping Dickerson's signature heart-on-sleeve sincerity. It's his most personal and dynamic project yet. For more, visit RussellDickerson.com. Partners   Media Partner

description: Pop | R&B | Soul Maniya is a New York-born/ Lehigh Valley-raised R&B and neo-soul artist who blends crisp vocals and sweet melodies with rich tones, riffs and rhythms to create a fresh new sound. A gifted performer from childhood, she earned the nickname "Songbird" for her natural musical instincts and powerful vocal presence.   Maniya began singing at 13 years old with the Emmy Award-winning Gospel for Teens Choir in Harlem, NY before earning her Bachelor's degree in Vocal Performance from Berklee College of Music. She later went on to tour, providing background vocals to sold-out crowds on major stages worldwide for top artists, including indie-pop sensation, TV Girl, among others.   Maniya recently embarked on her first tour, "Covered in Soul," reimagining classic Pop, Rock and R&B songs through a soulful lens. She is recognized not only as a rising star but also as a highly sought-after vocal coach, inspiring the next generation of singers while continuing to carve her own powerful lane in music.

Alternative | Blues | Rock 27 year old singer/songwriter/musician Lindsay Jordan is a multi-genre American artist from New Jersey. Lindsay is known for her emotive vocals and captivating blend of rock, pop, blues and alternative rock. She often writes about personal experiences navigating themes of love, self-discovery, women's empowerment, trauma and resilience.    With roots in classic rock and blues, Lindsay found inspiration at a young age from female artists like, Heart, Janis Joplin, Alanis Morrisette, Pink, KT Tunstall, Sheryl Crow, Melissa Etheridge and Joni Mitchell. Singing/performing since age 6 with her family of musicians, to becoming a full time artist at age 21.    Recent notable accomplishments include opening the stage for major touring artists like, The Goo Goo Dolls and Lake Street Dive, joining the recording academy as a Grammy voting member in 2025, and winning the 2025 Rising Star award from the International Singer Songwriters Association (ISSA).

venue: The Guardian Life Insurance Company of America Zinzenplatz
description: Folk | Americana | Pop | Rock Amelia Day is a musical jack-of-all-trades. Standing at the intersection of folk, rock, and pop, Day blends heartfelt storytelling, raw delivery, and unforgettable melodies into music that feels both fresh and familiar - like rediscovering an old favorite. A self-described writer before anything else, her perceptive lyricism extends far beyond her 23 years, with lines reminiscent of songwriting greats like Joni Mitchell and Paul Simon. As the Spokesman-Review notes, Day has a signature style that features "wordplay, double-meanings and rhythmic variations," with themes ranging from journeying into adulthood to climate change. Many of Day's songs are also shaped by her intimate relationships, where her queerness and candor take center stage.

Funk | Pop | R&B | Soul Christian Moon... the embodiment of suave, smooth, and sensual saxophonist artistry. With every breath, Moon weaves a magical tapestry of fascinating sounds. Each note glides with finesse, caressing the air with a tender touch. He captivates audiences in a world of sheer musical enchantment, transporting them through a musical journey like no other - an experience so divine that it lingers in the hearts of listeners long after the last note has faded.     Moon has mesmerized online audiences, garnering a devoted following he likes to call, 'The Family'. Through soul-stirring recordings and captivating videos he trail-blazes in the digital realm to bring the allure of the saxophone to millions. Moon seeks to inspire and uplift others in every performance, encouraging them to shine their own light. 'In the same way, let your light shine before others, so that they may see your good works and give glory to your Father who is in heaven.' (Matthew 5:16)

Children's/Family | Folk | Americana Lolly Hopwood is a kindie artist that can perform as a solo act, a duo, trio, or full band. She is based in Doylestown, PA. Her interactive children's music performances are filled with imagination and movement that will really get the audience involved in the show. Using props like parachutes, pom poms, scarves, bubbles, and puppets, the audience won't just be watching the concert, they will be a part of the show.   Lolly's musical influences are classic Sesame Street, Mister Rogers, Harry Nilsson, Cat Stevens, Elizabeth Mitchell, Dan Zanes, Dolly Parton & an array of modern indie artists. She has been compared to Elizabeth Mitchell & the Laurie Berkner Band.

venue: Lutron Jazz Cabaret Stage at Frank Banko Alehouse Cinemas
description: Jazz | Latin | Pop  What happens when jazz sophistication, Latin fire, and pop heart share the same stage? You get Dr. Doctor, a Lehigh Valley ensemble that doesn't fit neatly into any one box, and that's exactly the point.Vocalist Sonia Weimann leads with a voice that moves from smoky and sultry to bright and soaring, backed by Frank DiBussolo's silky guitar work, the deep resonant pulse of Phillip Bonanni's upright bass, and Thomas Epstein's percussion keeping it all beautifully in motion. Their two-hour set is a journey. Familiar melodies get reimagined, unexpected grooves show up when you least expect them, and the Latin rhythms woven through the set have been known to move people in ways they didn't quite plan on. The mood shifts. The energy builds. And somehow, by the end, you'll feel like you've been let in on something special. This is live music that listens back. Come ready to feel it.

Children's/Family | Street Performer | Percussion Orbital is a percussion-centric music entertainment group located in Bethlehem, PA. The group features various drumline style routines, choreographed percussion shows and even bagpipes. The group believes in empowering musicians and creating jaw-dropping live musical performances.      Orbital Drumline was founded in April of 2018 by a group of five friends. With a set of used drums we found on Facebook Marketplace and a dream, we set out to create an entertainment percussive experience like no other. Hundreds of shows later - we are still going strong!      The group is made up entirely of Liberty High School alumni and former Grenadier Band Members and almost all of their head drummers from 2017-2025. We are proud of our Bethlehem roots and have received training and mentorship from world renowned musicians and percussionists like Stu Warmington, Tyler Fry, and members of the Red Hot Chili Pipers.

Latin | World | Other  Adrian Anthony is singer/Musician/Musical Director/ arranger and producer he comes to you with an extremely diverse background with many years of playing in a variety of bands spanning from Puerto Rico to United States. He's had the honor of performing alongside and open for numerous famous Latin musicians, for example Elvis Crespo, Tobby Love, Henry "Pucho" Brown, the late Tito Puente, Johnny Pacheco, and among many others. His experience and influences have given him the ability to entertain in a variety of Latin Rhythms and styles. His band comes together collaborating from areas of Pennsylvania, New york and New Jersey, providing you with the Hipnotic sounds of Merengue, Salsa, bachata, reggaeton, cumbia, boleros, and top 40 English tunes with a Latin twist. He performs with his full band and quartet set-ups through the states. Just Remember his teams of talented musicians come together for one goal to make you Dance the night away!!!!

Jazz | Street Performer | New Orleans Friday and Saturday nights, the Big Easy Easton Brass turns Main St. into Bourbon St. as they bring Mardi Gras to Musikfest!!! Open to all ages and skill levels, this community band is bringing a New Orleans tradition to the streets of Easton. A Second Line parade is not one you just watch go by, it's one you participate in. Walk along, Dance along, Sing along, Shake a Tambourine, Fill the Streets with Bubbles or even learn to play an instrument and jump on in, this band wants to blur the line between spectator and participant. Free to join, rehearsals are at the Easton Area Community Center at 901 Washington St.

Indie | Rock Bren is a Philly-based singer/songwriter writing cathartic pop tunes from a punk heart. Having moved over 10 times in her life, dropped out of college, ended and started new relationships, Bren knows a thing or two about unexpected change. Breaking through self-doubt is a common theme throughout her writing. Distilling influences ranging from Elliott Smith to Mitski to the Pixies, Bren's music shares familiar sentiments of vulnerability and introspection, serving as your companion for feelings you may not have even realized you had.

description: Singer-Songwriter Hey Groovy People, I'm Payton Renee-your "Groovy Girl" from Lehigh Valley, Pennsylvania. I am a singer-songwriter blending rock, country, and alternative genres with the occasional surprise to keep things fresh. My performances are all about connection-singing, laughing, dancing, and having a great time together while leaving stress behind. I'm always learning and growing-both as an artist and a person. I'm constantly looking to expand my horizons, create fresh content, and build my audience while networking and connecting with amazing people. Music is my passion, but more than that, it's a way to spread love and joy. Whether I'm performing at a local restaurant, bar, or festival, my goal is to create moments that leave you feeling uplifted and connected. ​ Thanks for being a part of this journey-I'm so grateful for each and every "groovy" person who supports me along the way. Here's to good music, good vibes, and unforgettable memories. -P

Party/Cover | Pop | Rock Now in their 21st year entertaining audiences in the Lehigh Valley and beyond, COMMON BOND is anything but a common band. Firmly rooted in classic rock, COMMON BOND offers an eclectic mix of the best music from the 70's to today. Whether you enjoy hearing classics from bands like AC/DC, RUSH and Ozzy or hitting the dance floor with Prince, Måneskin and Pitbull, COMMON BOND spans many genres with skilled musicianship and enthusiasm! MUSIC is our COMMON BOND!!

Blues | R&B | Soul The Groove Merchants are here to throw down and break out. Founded in 2012, at Kutztown University in Pennsylvania by lead vocalist Tye Vallone, lead guitarist Luke Ferracone, and bassist John Evin Groome, thegroup now boasts driving a 9-piece lineup ideal for larger stages featuring Josh Maskornick on drums, Mike Talento on Tenor Sax, Jimmy Boyle on Trumpet, John Bickel on Hammond Organ, and Brie Parry & Jenny Founds on backing vocals. This full-bodied, energetic, and soulful sound can be heard on the Groove Merchants' latest release, "Real Estate," produced by Grammy-winner Phil Joly and mastered by Colin Bryson out of The Bunker/Electric Lady Studios in NYC, the song has received major airplay on WXPN Philadelphia and NPR affiliate WDIY in Bethlehem. New music is planned for release in late 2026. Once The Groove Merchants show up, expect relentless, soulful energy and a belief in connecting beyond music.

Blues | Folk | Americana | R&B Based in the Lehigh Valley PA, The BC Combo began as BC & The Blues Crew in 1992. Bev Conklin was signed by MoMojo Records and with the band has been headlining and performing throughout the Northeast at major festivals, theaters and concerts. This highly awarded band has been graced with performances on bills that included Ray Charles, Buddy Guy, Koko Taylor, Ronnie Earl, Shemekia Copeland, Kenny Neal, Son Seals, Lonnie Brooks, Rhonnie Baker Brooks, Saffire, the Holmes Brothers, Pinetop Perkins, Eddie the Chief Clearwater, Carl Weathersby, Eddie King, Mike Wheeler, John Primer, Chris Cain and many more.   The BC Combo is composed of artists from New Orleans, Chicago, Alpha NJ and Bethlehem PA. They have established a signature sound as singer-songwriters. In addition to being a finalist at the International Blues Competition in Memphis TN (representing Billtown Blues Association), they are among the Lehigh Valley's highly respected bands. Their motto... It's all about having fun!

venue: Air Products Americaplatz at Levitt Pavilion SteelStacks
description: World | Korean Rock | Dance Experience a groundbreaking fusion of rock, Korean traditional music, and mask dance rhythms with Insun Park & Generals. A master of the Gangnyeong Mask Dance, designated as Korea's National Intangible Heritage, Park leads the quartet, blending her dynamic vocal and dance performances with the talents of Donghyuk Heo (composer/guitar), Hyunmo Yang (drums), Johyun Kim (taepyeongso/flute), and Hahyungki Baek (bass guitar). Together, they create a dynamic blend of ancestral art and contemporary sound, seamlessly merging traditional rhythms with modern rock influences. This ensemble pushes creative boundaries, offering a fresh perspective on Korea's cultural heritage while making traditional mask dance more accessible to today's audiences.   Insun Park stands out as one of the few female masters of the Gangnyeong Mask Dance, a tradition historically dominated by men. Renowned for her innovative spirit, she reimagines age-old songs and performance styles to connect with modern audiences.

venue: Lyrikplatz at Frank Banko Alehouse Cinemas
description: Celtic | Irish | Folk | Americana Who on Earth decides to begin a musical relationship on the basis of traditional Irish music? Just ask Zach Russack and Colin O'Leary because they certainly did.   Spread apart between NJ and PA, the two independent singer/songwriters crossed paths with the idea of creating a project specifically wrapped around performing renditions of Celtic / English ballads. With their passions brewed together, Finnegan's Wake was born, bringing you modern renditions of century-old traditional pieces from Ireland and England, along with timeless folk classics. Not to mention that (if asked nicely) they will perform their own individual originals together as a duo.   Finnegan's Wake tends to keep their presence low-key, so it is always a treat to see their performances live. Keeping an eye out on both of their independent social medias gives a clue as to when and where you will see them next. But the biggest tell of all? Ask them what they'll be doing on St. Paddy's Day!

Blues | Rock | Soul Rae the Band is a soulful, funky, and blues influenced band from NYC. Blending sounds of 60s soul, electric blues, and classic rock through their original music alongside their specially selected covers. Rae the Band aspires to honor and lift up the music of their heroes such as B.B. King, Albert King, Aretha Franklin, Mahalia Jackson, Ray Charles and more, hoping to extend their impact on to a new generation.

venue: The Guardian Life Insurance Company of America Zinzenplatz
description: Oldies The Large Flowerheads revive the vibrant spirit of the groovy '60s, bringing to life the iconic music that defined an era. Their tribute showcases chart-topping hits from legendary artists such as The Beatles, Rolling Stones, Mamas & the Papas, The Grass Roots, The Turtles, Jefferson Airplane, Dusty Springfield, and many more. Through their engaging and interactive performances, The Large Flowerheads breathe new life into the timeless music of the 60s, ensuring its legacy remains unforgettable. Let's give a warm welcome to the 9-time Lehigh Valley Music Awards winner for "Best Entertaining Band" - THE LARGE FLOWERHEA

Come see your favorite local comedians, actors, and others who can't get enough of the stage, battle it out, lip sync style! They'll be competing by lip syncing to your favorite songs; from classic hits to the latest jams. Who will take home the coveted title of Lip Sync Champion?  Hosted by Anthony DeSanctis and Alessandra Fanelli  Anthony DeSanctis is ArtsQuest's Senior Programming Manager and the Director of the Greater Lehigh Valley Filmmaker Festival. He is a Penn State alum with a BA in Media Studies from the College of Communications. A true movie aficionado, Anthony has written and directed a few films as well. His film The Alley won Best Film at the Front House “Philm” Fest in Philadelphia in 2014. In his spare time, he enjoys improv comedy and has performed with The Associated Mess and as a member of the Improv Comedy Power Hour.  Alessandra Fanelli (she/her/hers) is an Arts Administrator and Digital Content Creator. In addition to serving non-profit theaters in the Lehigh Valley, she has also performed on stage in community theatre productions. She was previously the Box Office and Film Manager for Civic Theatre of Allentown. Alessandra graduated from West Chester University in 2016 with a Bachelor's Degree in Communication Studies, with a Minor in Italian and Concentration in Video Production and is currently pursuing her Masters in Arts Administration at Kutztown University. Alessandra spends her free time eating bagels and playing with her cat and dog, who are often mistaken for Gremlins. *Note: This show will contain adult language and/or situations. Anyone coming in between the ages of 13 and 17 must be accompanied by a parent or guardian. No child 12 or under will be admitted.

Breaking through self-doubt is a common theme throughout her writing. Distilling influences ranging from Elliott Smith to Mitski to the Pixies, Bren's music shares familiar sentiments of vulnerability and introspection, serving as your companion for feelings you may not have even realized you had.

artist: Cunningham & Associates: A Tribute to The Rolling Stones
description: Party/Cover | Rock Cunningham & Associates is a rock n roll cover band led by former Bethlehem Mayor and current Lehigh Valley economic development leader Don Cunningham. The band features a lineup of Lehigh Valley veteran musicians playing FM radio hits of the '60s, '70s, & '80s, including John Bloys on lead guitar, Rick Repsher on keyboards, and Vern Mobley on drums. A Musikfest favorite, the band has played the festival for more than 20 years, often performing tribute sets to The Rolling Stones, Bruce Springsteen and The E Street Band or delivering non-stop, party rock n' roll sets. Cunningham & Associates is a regular at Lehigh Valley festivals and special events, and performs often at ArtsQuest and the Wind Creek Casino. In his final Lehigh Valley performance at Easton's State Theater, rock n roll legend Chuck Berry used Cunningham & Associates as his opening act.

venue: Air Products Americaplatz at Levitt Pavilion SteelStacks
description: Alternative | Rock Sixpence None the Richer is a rock band known for its distinctive blend of indie-rock and introspective songwriting. Their live performances are filled with guitar riffs, driving bass, and pounding drums. As they embark on touring in 2024 and 2025, their first since 2013, lead singer Leigh Nash shares her excitement, saying, "I want to come out swinging."   With a discography spanning six full-length albums and the newly released Rosemary Hill EP, Sixpence's sound remains anchored in Nash's unmistakable vocals and Matt Slocum's intricate guitar work. The band is perhaps best known for their hit singles, including Kiss Me-which reached No. 2 on the Billboard Hot 100 and became a top-10 hit in sixteen countries-alongside There She Goes, Breathe Your Name, and Don't Dream It's Over.

Funk Party | Cover R&B | Soul The area's hottest dance and party band, The Philadelphia Funk Authority, was created with one thing in mind-to provide the very best in high-energy dance and party entertainment! Proving time and again the ability to deliver at parties, clubs, festivals, weddings, concerts and corporate events, PFA has built a reputation of making the party happen. The talented musicians of the Philadelphia Funk Authority bring together the experience of thousands of performances to formulate the ultimate entertainment machine. Truly delivering what many bands only promise, the Philadelphia Funk Authority prides itself on being able to provide the ultimate party and dance experience, regardless of venue. Specializing in getting the crowd out on the dance floor with the best soul, R&B, funk, dance and party music from the past 40 years, PFA is a group of dedicated, experienced and professional musicians ready to provide you with the perfect entertainment. We bring the party!

Funk | Party/Cover | Pop Established in 1979, JOYOUS has evolved into the talented nine-member group of professional musicians and vocalists of today. Well known in the Lehigh Valley and surrounding areas, they continue to receive rave reviews! With driving rhythm, a "take no prisoners" horn section that screams like no other, and soulful vocalists that entertain with outstanding showmanship, their passion resonates through unforgettable performances. You will hear the best of many genres, including Soul, Funk, Disco, Pop, and Party tunes.

artist: Movement Moves Media Presents: Reggae Night with LNJ Sessions

description: Alternative | Indie | Rock We are No James! A local band in Pennsylvania that loves to share original music and covers with the community! We mainly play punk and emo songs, but we also love the feeling of the crowd singing along to more popular radio songs! We hope to inspire people with our music the same way our favorite artists have inspired us.

venue: The Guardian Life Insurance Company of America Zinzenplatz
description: Rock | Metal MindMaze are a four piece progressive/power metal band from the Lehigh Valley, PA. Since their formation in 2012 they've released 3 full-length albums as well as some singles and an EP that fuse elements of hard rock, traditional metal, progressive metal and power metal together to create a unique sound. Musically, MindMaze features powerful female vocals, melodic and memorable guitar hooks, taking inspiration from bands such as Iron Maiden, Dream Theater, Savatage, Riot and Saxon. The band has continuously focused on delivering 100% live, high energy performances filled with spontaneity. They've toured all over the US and Canada, including performing at the famed Whisky A Go Go in Los Angeles and legendary niche festival ProgPower USA in Atlanta.

Funk | Party/Cover | Rock COVERING ALL YOUR FAVORITES FROM ABBA, BLONDIE, FLEETWOOD MAC, AC/DC, KISS, PAT BENATAR, BRUNO MARS, JANIS JOPLIN, ZZ TOP, MOTLEY CRUE, JOAN JETT, DISCO, FUNK AND EVERYTHING IN-BETWEEN....................WE ARE GirlCrue! GirlCrue is an All-Female Rock*Dance*Funk*High Energy Party Band from the Lehigh Valley. Performing live since early 2014, GirlCrue has shot straight to the top in the local circuit. Stacked with 4 incredible musicians with 3 power-house vocalists, these girls match the best of them and each has their very own forte, but yet blend together with amazing harmonies and musical talent. Their strong and blended sound is created from their combined musical influences of multiple genres from the 70's, 80's 90's and now..................the planets have finally aligned with this ferocious four, creating the only All-Female Rock Band in the Lehigh Valley. We are GirlCrue!

Country | Folk | Americana One Acre West is the Americana project of singer Kristi Jean and songwriter Steven Branstetter. Drawing from roots in Texas, Colorado, and the Appalachian ridge-and-valley region, the duo creates music rooted in storytelling, country, and Americana traditions.   After years performing in cover bands, Kristi and Steven felt called to tell stories of their own. Their songs explore love, loss, place, change, and the winding paths that shape a life. The name One Acre West reflects both their western roots and the idea of carving out a small, meaningful place in the landscape of original music.   Their debut album was produced by acclaimed Austin producer Bradley Kopp, whose credits include work with Joe Ely, Jimmie Dale Gilmore, The Flatlanders, Eliza Gilkyson, and Jerry Jeff Walker. Honest, reflective, and deeply personal, One Acre West's music honors the past while embracing what comes next, inviting listeners into stories shaped by grit, grace, and lived experience.
Country | Folk | Americana | Polka 18 Time Grammy Award Winner the Jimmy Sturr Orchestra

Street Performer Lucy Juggles' one-woman comedy juggling show is a unique blend of southern charm, extraordinary stunts, and emotional vulnerability. Full of bad jokes, cute tricks, unicycles, and lots of knives, Lucy's Denim & Danger Circus show will delight audiences of all ages!

Street Performer Twisted Rhythm, an award-winning show based out of Clearwater Beach, Florida. We combine high energy breakdancing with signature comedic stylings through nonstop, laugh-out-loud moments and jaw dropping moves that leave the audience on their feet.

Alternative | Pop Anthony Winters is a Philly-based pop singer and songwriter who has been developing his sound since 2016, earning over 4 million streams and a growing fanbase drawn to his confident vocals and magnetic stage presence. He has sold out multiple shows across Pennsylvania, including performances opening for Drake Bell and Sammy Adams, as well as headlining packed rooms in Philadelphia, Media, and West Chester. He performs live with a six-piece band that brings his energetic pop sound to life on stage.   Anthony also performs throughout the tri-state area with the popular wedding band Paris. Influenced by The Weeknd, Justin Bieber, James Arthur, Michael Jackson, and Bruno Mars, he continues to build momentum with standout tracks like "Mid July" and "Rocks at Your Window." In 2026, he released his debut EP What We Can't Change, marking a new chapter in his artistry and continuing to expand his growing audience.

venue: Lutron Jazz Cabaret Stage at Frank Banko Alehouse Cinemas
description: Jazz | Chill Fusion Known by fans as the Soulful Traveling Spaceman Bassman, Carter Fox is a bassist, producer, songwriter, and author blending jazz, rock, chill-fi, and experimental electronic music into a cosmic-inspired sonic experience. Carter has toured internationally with R&B legends Freddie Jackson and Regina Belle, and has appeared on bills with artists such as Jeffrey Osborne, Brian McKnight, and Patti LaBelle. As a solo artist, Carter's music has amassed millions of streams worldwide. In 2025, Carter released his acclaimed album Physics of the Impossible through Swedish label Insert Tapes. The album reached the Top 50 Hip-Hop Albums chart on Apple Music Japan. He also released Exploring Cosmic Melodies as a companion book to the album. His newest EP, Mobius Strip, continues this sonic exploration. Whether performing on stages, crafting soundscapes, or empowering fellow independent artists, Carter Fox continues pushing creative boundaries while encouraging audiences to "travel soulfully."

Funk | Jazz | Latin The Jazz Experience has been happening twice month at arts quest for the past six years. On the first and third Thursdays from 7-10 PM. the housewarming trio of Vern Mobley, Brian Bortz and Joe Mixon Plays host to some of the finest instrumentalists and vocalist in the area. This show will feature a few of the artist who she the stage with us each Thursday.

artist: Miss Stacy's Kids Show: At the Zoo-oo-oo
description: Children's/Family Miss Stacy (aka Stacy Gabel) is a performer, recording artist, singer-songwriter, and author who delights young audiences with high-energy shows and original music. With extensive experience as a musician, dance, and music instructor, she creates interactive programs for preschool and early elementary children that blend storytelling, movement, and music to inspire creativity and confidence. A former writer and producer for Nickelodeon and a voting member of the Recording Academy, Miss Stacy brings imagination and heart to every performance. Her award-nominated book and song, "At the Zoo-oo-oo," is featured at schools, libraries, churches, and festivals nationwide. She also adapts programs for older children, adding storytelling, writing, dance, and hip-hop-inspired movement. Stacy performs internationally as a vocalist, a solo artist, with The Stacy Gabel Band, and with her jazz band A Touch of Class.

venue: The Guardian Life Insurance Company of America Zinzenplatz
description: Alternative | Indie | Rock Since 2023, Philadelphia-based Flavorless Gum have brought a fresh and daring approach to indie rock with poetic lyrics about local characters seemingly stuck in time, the influences of wealth and greed, and the counterbalance between perfection and humanity. Their music resonates with raw emotion and undeniable power. From recording and mixing to marketing and merch design, flavorless gum is a true DIY collective. Exploring the state of the world, heartbreak, and the absurdity and beauty of life, Flavorless Gum are reminding you how well-written, rollicking tunes can refresh your spirit and make you want to listen over and over again.

Rap/Hip-Hop | Latin Hip-Hop Ray Pearson is a Puerto Rican Latin Hip-Hop recording artist originally from The Bronx, NY. Raised in a home where Hip-Hop and Spanish music played nonstop, Ray found his earliest influence through his older brother Mello, which led him to lyrical icons like Eminem and Big Pun. That inspiration pushed him to record his first song at just 12 years old, produced by his cousin DJ HekTek.    Blending traditional boom bap with classic Latin percussion, Ray represents a rising generation of artists embracing both their cultural roots and Hip-Hop foundations. Since 2019, he has proudly showcased his Puerto Rican identity through his music, creating a unique lane within Latin Urban culture.

Folk | Americana The Flying Vees craft songs with humor, rage, and tenderness. Their music invites you to smash your smart phone with a hammer and experience the full spectrum of your humanity.With their unique brand of sultry, high and lonesome 3 part harmonies, blues guitar, and full bodied piano arrangements, these four women enchant audiences with a slow simmering, uniquely feminine rage full of wry humor, addressing complex social issues ranging from abortions, murder ballads, and substance abuse to a gospel hymn singing praises about an 8-inch << insert euphemism >> You'll laugh, you'll cry, you'll leave feeling invigorated and empowered.They'll scratch an itch you didn't know you had. Don't miss a rare Flying Vees show: no one is doing it like they do.

artist: Bayou Risin': A Tribute to Creedence Clearwater Revival and John Fogerty
description: Tribute Bayou Risin is a premier Creedence Clearwater Revival (CCR) tribute band that delivers an authentic and electrifying live experience, faithfully capturing the energy and tone of John Fogerty and the legendary CCR.     Tim Fitzpatrick's remarkable ability to recreate Fogerty's iconic vocals and guitar work sets the stage for an unforgettable performance.    - Bobby Ventura on rhythm guitar and backing vocals, adding depth and harmony to the band's rich sonic landscape.     - Mark Nourick on drums, driving the rhythm with precision and power, capturing the essence of CCR's driving the rhythm with precision and power, capturing the essence of CCR's classic beats.    - Matt Scrbacic on bass, providing a solid foundation with his groovy and tight bass lines, ensuring an authentic and compelling performance.   Together, Bayou Risin pays homage to CCR's greatest hits. Dedication to authenticity and their high-energy performances make them a favorite among CCR and classic rock fans.

venue: Lyrikplatz at Frank Banko Alehouse Cinemas

description: Folk | Americana | Rock  As The Neighbors Tried To Sleep is a gritty, funny, and painfully honest collection of late-night tales where chandeliers turn into piñatas, landfills bloom with flowers, and strange characters drift in and out like half-remembered dreams. It's an album that walks the fine line between heartbreak and humor, finding poetry in the wreckage and warmth in the weirdness of being alive. A construction worker by day and a keyboard poet by night, Warnek has emerged as one of Music City's most skillful new songwriters, blending a myriad of influences into something entirely his own. The verve and attitude of Warren Zevon, the piano-pop of Tumbleweed Connection-era Elton John, the pumping '70s glam-rock of Ian Hunter and Mott The Hoople, the folk-rock earthiness of classic Bob Dylan and the sharp-tongued balladry of Randy Newman; they're all here, bound together by Warnek's raggedly earnest vocals and wry lyrics. Warnek is the rare songwriter who can make you laugh, wince, and

Alternative | Indie | Rock With his deep reverence for lyricism and tight songwriting (think Hozier), Patrick could be an acoustic-guitar-playing singer-songwriter... but during the dark days of the pandemic, discovering Marc Rebillet's livestreams immediately ignited his passion for Livelooping.   Now, he bridges two worlds with his music - accompanying his singer-songwriter sensibilities and rockstar lead vocals with unlimited ethereal background vocals, expressive synths, and buzzsaw guitars. The result is a sonic experience that feels equal parts experimental and radio-ready.   Patrick's Livelooping is intensely choreographed as he builds a song layer after layer into an absolute wall of sound. Through it all, he takes the audience on an emotional journey that's more than the sum of its Loops.    And nothing is pre-recorded- every note is played 100% live.

venue: The Guardian Life Insurance Company of America Zinzenplatz
description: Indie | Rock Bren is a Philly-based singer/songwriter writing cathartic pop tunes from a punk heart. Having moved over 10 times in her life, dropped out of college, ended and started new relationships, Bren knows a thing or two about unexpected change. Breaking through self-doubt is a common theme throughout her writing. Distilling influences ranging from Elliott Smith to Mitski to the Pixies, Bren's music shares familiar sentiments of vulnerability and introspection, serving as your companion for feelings you may not have even realized you had.

Country | Pop | Rock CoverFire! is the 28th IDʼs premier rock and pop ensemble, delivering high-energy performances that showcase the versatility and talent of Pennsylvania's Army National Guard musicians. With a repertoire spanning classic rock anthems, current pop hits, rhythm & blues, and original arrangements, CoverFire! connects with audiences of all ages through music that is both familiar and inspiring.

Alternative | Rock Formed in New Jersey, Coquettish is a raw and electrifying trio redefining the edges of alternative rock. With Michael O'Keefe on guitar and vocals, Bryanna Rosario on bass, and Matteo Conn on percussion, the band blends elements of psychedelic rock, grunge, punk, and alt-rock into a sound that's both nostalgic and fiercely current. Their debut single, "A Bullet Can Cure Cancer," dropped in 2025 and set the tone with its gritty energy and unfiltered emotion. With their first full-length album arriving this November, Coquettish is poised to carve out their place in the underground and beyond-distorted, defiant, and deeply human.

venue: Lyrikplatz at Frank Banko Alehouse Cinemas
description: Indie Julia Melito is a soulful singer-songwriter from Bucks County & the Lehigh Valley. She has been writing music her whole life, cataloging experiences with heartbreak, grief, joy, and love through her songs. She weaves spellbinding melodies to capture the mood of her lyrics. When she is not onstage, you can find her counseling high school students or pondering life on the bank of her favorite creek.

Blues | Rock Wood 'N' Strings is a father and son duo playing classic rock as well as rock from the 90s and on. Wood 'N' Strings has nice harmonies and can be found playing at various places in the Lehigh Valley and beyond.

Folk | Americana | Indie | Pop Riley Lauren is an indie/folk singer songwriter from Philadelphia, PA, but she is in the process of relocating to Nashville, TN! Her music features bright, melodic vocals on top of dense harmonies and acoustic instrumentation. She is a unique storyteller, creating a relatable and engaging listening experience. She just put out her seventh independent release, and is working on a debut EP.

Party/Cover | Pop | Rock SLAMB IS BACK AT MUSIKFEST, HIP HIP HOORAY!   SLAMB is a young and rising cover band out of Easton, Pennsylvania, made up of five lifelong friends who know how to light up a stage. With a fun, high-energy vibe and a crowd-pleasing setlist that spans genres and generations, SLAMB turns every show into a party.   Well-known for their creative mashups, seamless transitions, and infectious stage presence, they keep audiences dancing, laughing, and singing all night long. Whether you're craving a night of non-stop dancing, a blast of nostalgia, or just a chance to let loose, SLAMB brings the perfect mix to make it happen.   So, get ready to move, sing, and feel the music-because when you're at a SLAMB show, you're not just watching a band. You're joining the SLAMB family for an unforgettable experience. Let's get loud, let's get wild, and let's roll with SLAMB!

venue: The Guardian Life Insurance Company of America Zinzenplatz
description: Indie | Pop | Rock Cathy Ritter is the emerging singer-songwriter the pop industry has waited for. Raised by two musicians in southeast Pennsylvania, Cathy has a deeply rooted connection to poetic story-telling through songs that she has showcased in Allentown, Philadelphia, and throughout New York City. Cathy writes of love in all its forms, and tells her own coming-of-age story earnestly through an energetic acoustic vessel in original songs like "Witching Hour", "Green" and "Under the Radar". Her voice is unmistakably authentic, as it blends her warm tone with both distinct power and an intentional softness, as heard in her songs "Alpenglow" and "Blanket". She strives to break ground as a versatile and unique vocalist and songwriter while paying homage to the great female singers that she has trained to emulate since girlhood, not limited to the timeless voices of Ann Wilson and Bonnie Raitt, as well as today's big-voice pop icons such as Lady Gaga, Adele, and Kelly Clarkson.

Folk | Americana | Indie | Pop | Rock Lydia von Hof is an emerging indie artist based in New York. Her music explores the realms of the indie world, including folk, rock, pop, and occasionally country. Her songwriting invites audiences into a wide range of themes, everything from classic heartbreak and the queer experience to reimagined modern-day Shakespearean tales.    Lydia has opened for artists including Liz Longley, SWMRS, A Boogie Wit Da Hoodie, and more. She has performed at Festivals such as SXSW and the O+ Festival, as well as venues including Madison Square Garden for the New York Knicks halftime show, The Bitter End in NYC, and the Hard Rock Café in Boston. Her songwriting has garnered acclaim, as she was recently selected as the winner of the ASCAP Writers' Showcase in the Spring of 2022 at Belmont University. Lydia is a Belmont University Songwriting Alumna and was recently signed to Unispan Records as of 2024.

venue: Lyrikplatz at Frank Banko Alehouse Cinemas
description: Alternative | Rock Zach Marsden is a 20-year-old alternative artist based in Philadelphia, blending rock and singer-songwriter. Marsden picked up his first guitar on the first day of the COVID-19 shutdown. Drawing inspiration from Hozier, Green Day, and Noah Kahan, Zach Marsden brings a unique musical blend to listeners in their late teens and 20s. Marsden started his recording career in his bedroom, but began studio recording at Drexel University in Philadelphia. While studying Music Industry with a minor in Law, Zach Marsden has had the opportunity to learn about and observe various aspects of the industry and is applying this knowledge in real time throughout his career. A performer since childhood, taught to sing by his father at age three, Marsden has spent years onstage through choirs, musicals, bands, and now as a solo artist. Hell or High Water, Zach Marsden's debut EP, showcases his 20 years of growth. The title itself is a testament to Zach's determination for this project and his career.

Funk | Pop | R&B | Soul Meet Bryan Hansen Band, hailing from Central New Jersey (it does exist). Their music, as defined by Lenny Green of WBLS, is a soulful concoction dubbed "Blue Eyed Soul," blending funky rhythms with bluesy vibes and soulful melodies.   From the Jersey Shore to iconic venues like Bowery Electric NYC and the House of Blues Anaheim, these guys have been Making America Funk Again. They've even graced the legendary Troubadour in West Hollywood and been featured at Winter NAMM 2020 & 2024 and SoFar Sounds D.C. & NYC.   From their debut EP in 2009 Ebb & Flow EP 2009, the band has released 4 LP's including Brothers Among Wolves 2013, When You Stop Pulling Back 2016, Gas Money 2019 and most recently, Jammin with Dr. Fong LP 2024.    Drawing inspiration from legends like Stevie Wonder, Dave Matthews Band, and Victor Wooten, Bryan Hansen Band infuses their music with soulful influences that resonate with audiences.   Bryan Hansen Band is proudly endorsed by Godin Guitars and BG France.

Jazz  The SteelStacks All-Star High School Jazz Ensemble is a select group of high school jazz musicians selected from regional high school jazz bands that participated in the SteelStacks High School Jazz Band Showcase.   The band is directed by Dr. Neil Wetzel, the Education Director of the Jazz Band Showcase; he is also Director of Jazz Studies at Moravian College (Bethlehem, PA). The students that make up the All-Star Band were award winners at the Showcase and are musical leaders at their home schools.   The group comes together in the summer months to prepare the repertoire for a MusikFest performance in August. Past participants have gone on to distinguished careers in music and music performance.   The group dedicates itself to performance of selections from the large jazz ensemble canon including swing, bebop and modern jazz genres.

venue: Lutron Jazz Cabaret Stage at Frank Banko Alehouse Cinemas
description: Jazz | Latin | World Rio Bossa performs traditional Latin, jazz, popular and original music in a unique and sensuous style, captivating audiences and weaving soulful melodies and savory Latin rhythms. Rio Bossa's catalog is inspired by diverse Latin traditional, folk and popular music including bossanova, samba, baiao, bolero, choro, and others.   Guitarist Jorge Torres brings deep ethnomusicological expertise and arranging abilities and specializes in a distinctive fingerpicked nylon guitar style. Vocalist Alyssa Lou Allen is a stunning and mesmerizing performer, pulling from her varied indie/soul/R&B and musical theater experience and performing in several different languages. Bassist Steve Foreman holds down the bottom on bass as well as penning several original songs for Rio Bossa. With a musical career spanning many genres, drummer/percussionist Bill Weisbach propels deep, dynamic grooves with flair and color from a sui generis hybrid cocktail kit.

Funk | Pop | R&B | Soul Christian Moon... the embodiment of suave, smooth, and sensual saxophonist artistry. With every breath, Moon weaves a magical tapestry of fascinating sounds. Each note glides with finesse, caressing the air with a tender touch. He captivates audiences in a world of sheer musical enchantment, transporting them through a musical journey like no other - an experience so divine that it lingers in the hearts of listeners long after the last note has faded.     Moon has mesmerized online audiences, garnering a devoted following he likes to call, 'The Family'. Through soul-stirring recordings and captivating videos he trail-blazes in the digital realm to bring the allure of the saxophone to millions. Moon seeks to inspire and uplift others in every performance, encouraging them to shine their own light. 'In the same way, let your light shine before others, so that they may see your good works and give glory to your Father who is in heaven.' (Matthew 5:16)

venue: Wind Creek Steel Stage at PNC Plaza
description: John Mulaney is a four-time Emmy Award, Critics' Choice Award and WGA Award-winning writer, comedian and actor. Mulaney is currently performing across the world on his latest stand-up tour, JOHN MULANEY: MISTER WHATEVER. Last year, Mulaney hosted, wrote, and executive-produced the Netflix talk show EVERYBODY'S LIVE WITH JOHN MULANEY. The show served as the continuation of the series EVERYBODY'S IN LA. The series featured monologues, guests, pre-taped sketches, musical segments and more. EVERYBODY'S IN LA was a six-night live comedy series that explored Los Angeles during the Netflix Is A Joke Festival in 2024. In December 2024, Mulaney starred in the Broadway play “All In: Comedy About Love,” alongside a cast including Fred Armisen, Richard Kind and Renee Elise Goldsberry. Mulaney can next be seen in the Amazon MGM Studios film, MADDEN, an upcoming American biographical sports drama directed by David O. Russell. Partner

Jazz | Street Performer | New Orleans Friday and Saturday nights, the Big Easy Easton Brass turns Main St. into Bourbon St. as they bring Mardi Gras to Musikfest!!! Open to all ages and skill levels, this community band is bringing a New Orleans tradition to the streets of Easton. A Second Line parade is not one you just watch go by, it's one you participate in. Walk along, Dance along, Sing along, Shake a Tambourine, Fill the Streets with Bubbles or even learn to play an instrument and jump on in, this band wants to blur the line between spectator and participant. Free to join, rehearsals are at the Easton Area Community Center at 901 Washington St.

venue: Lyrikplatz at Frank Banko Alehouse Cinemas
description: Indie | Pop | R&B | Soul Audrey Kreitner is a pop r&b singer-songwriter from Hunterdon County, NJ. Through her work blending genres, she created a captivating sound of her own. Audrey has graced the stages of Musikfest, Bitter End, Stone Pony, and plenty more. Audrey is in the final stages of completing her EP and will release her first album shortly after. She has music available on all streaming platforms and has collaborated with artists across a range of styles. On top of Audrey's artistic work, she is currently in her second year at Berklee College of Music, honing her craft and networking her way to the top.

Bluegrass Wood Flower's combination of tight harmonies, driving banjo, soulful mandolin, and electrifying twin guitars are the highlights that define this up-and-coming Bluegrass band. Since forming in 2022, Wood Flower has shared the stage with the likes of Ricky Skaggs, The Seldom Scene, East Nash Grass, and has performed at major festivals and renowned listening rooms across the region.   Wood Flower's self-titled debut album includes ten tracks, seven of which are original material and was released in the fall of 2024. It is available for purchase or streaming on all major platforms. Referencing landmark literature, modern headlines, and their own coming of age,  Renée Christine crafts powerful, stirring protest music without apology. Raised outside  of Philadelphia, PA and now based near Phoenix, AZ, Renée forged relationships with  people across the political spectrum as a backpacker, both informing and enforcing their  desire to write about what they believe in – from climate justice to calling out abuses of  power. Across their discography, Renée Christine speaks to the crises of a young  generation that has been dealt a losing hand by its predecessors, but maintains hope  for a better future. “I want to be bold in ways that my younger self could never imagine.”  Their debut album is set to release fall 2026.

venue: Air Products Americaplatz at Levitt Pavilion SteelStacks
description: Alternative | Country | Indie Dirty Dollhouse is the multi-genre music of Philadelphia-based artist Chelsea Mitchell, a folk chanteuse with classical training and a retro-pop composer with a soft spot for country.  Drawing from many muses has produced a uniquely diverse catalogue, but it has also made it near-impossible to who Mitchell sounds like. In sultry-toned moments you might hear Nicole Atkins, a soft bird-like peak could make you think of Kacey Musgraves, and a certain belt may summon Brandi Carlile. Though her vocals range from soft twang to unabashedly operatic, it could suffice to say that Mitchell's songs all fit under the same "singer-songwriter" umbrella as her lyrics weave a diary page to life and her band expands on structural simplicity with subtle grace.

Children's/Family | Street Performer | Percussion Orbital is a percussion-centric music entertainment group located in Bethlehem, PA. The group features various drumline style routines, choreographed percussion shows and even bagpipes. The group believes in empowering musicians and creating jaw-dropping live musical performances.      Orbital Drumline was founded in April of 2018 by a group of five friends. With a set of used drums we found on Facebook Marketplace and a dream, we set out to create an entertainment percussive experience like no other. Hundreds of shows later - we are still going strong!      The group is made up entirely of Liberty High School alumni and former Grenadier Band Members and almost all of their head drummers from 2017-2025. We are proud of our Bethlehem roots and have received training and mentorship from world renowned musicians and percussionists like Stu Warmington, Tyler Fry, and members of the Red Hot Chili Pipers.

venue: The Guardian Life Insurance Company of America Zinzenplatz
description: World | Korean Rock | Dance Experience a groundbreaking fusion of rock, Korean traditional music, and mask dance rhythms with Insun Park & Generals. A master of the Gangnyeong Mask Dance, designated as Korea's National Intangible Heritage, Park leads the quartet, blending her dynamic vocal and dance performances with the talents of Donghyuk Heo (composer/guitar), Hyunmo Yang (drums), Johyun Kim (taepyeongso/flute), and Hahyungki Baek (bass guitar). Together, they create a dynamic blend of ancestral art and contemporary sound, seamlessly merging traditional rhythms with modern rock influences. This ensemble pushes creative boundaries, offering a fresh perspective on Korea's cultural heritage while making traditional mask dance more accessible to today's audiences.   Insun Park stands out as one of the few female masters of the Gangnyeong Mask Dance, a tradition historically dominated by men. Renowned for her innovative spirit, she reimagines age-old songs and performance styles to connect with modern audiences.

Alternative | Indie | Rock Redletter Radio is a rock band from West Philadelphia. Founded by Jonas Weidenhammer, Ricky Weir, and Lucas Snavely, who discovered their shared love for alternative country, grunge, and vintage rock music while working as food service staff at the late World Cafe Live. Redletter Radio takes a stripped-back and honest approach to songwriting and recording - preferring to let songs exist as they are, rather than striving for sonic perfection. Songwriting and lead vocals are a shared effort between Jonas Weidenhammer, who typically performs as the band's guitar-strumming frontman, and Ricky Weir, who is more frequently on lead guitar. The band's strong instrumental sound is based on the foundation laid by drummer Lucas Snavely, who draws from an electric catalog of drumming styles. Joe Walgenbach is the newest member of the band and provides a rock-solid and energetic rhythmic and melodic backbone with his bass playing.

venue: Lyrikplatz at Frank Banko Alehouse Cinemas
description: Party/Cover | Pop | Rock Shaun Lally is a Lehigh Valley-based entertainer renowned for forging genuine connections with every audience. He is best known for his signature creative mashups, which seamlessly fuse different genres, eras, and classic hits into a unique, high-energy experience. A versatile lead vocalist, guitarist, and pianist, Shaun performs as a solo artist, in various duos, and as the frontman of the Shaun Lally Band.   Beyond the stage, Shaun is a cornerstone of the local music community, actively cultivating talent by hosting four prominent open mics across Nazareth, Bethlehem, and Allentown. What truly sets him apart is his vast musical library; fans are consistently impressed by a catalog of over 500 songs committed entirely to memory-allowing for a spontaneous, screen-free performance. Festival-goers can expect an intimate, interactive set featuring his trademark mashups and the stories that bring the music to life.

Country Adam & the Armadillos deliver a sound that honors traditional country, backed by high-energy performances and a strong connection with their audience. Hailing from Central Pennsylvania, the band has built steady momentum through standout live shows and well-received original releases. They've taken the stage at notable events like Whiskey Jam in Nashville and The Hideout at the Houston Rodeo this past March. Their single "Ain't What She's Needin'" was featured on Spotify's All New Country playlist, and "Cowgirl Like Mine" surpassed 100,000 streams in its first week. With new music on the way, Adam & the Armadillos continue to establish themselves as a rising force in country music.

Pop | R&B | Soul | World Alysha Brilla is a 3× JUNO Award nominated songwriter, producer and electrifying live performer, as well as the 2025 Women in Music International Leadership Honouree and a 2024 Canadian Screen Award nominee. Sounds of earth, songs of stars. Rooted in her Indo-Tanzanian heritage and shaped by the Great Lakes in Canada, Brilla's sound is distinctly unique. Driven by global percussion, percussive guitar and soaring vocals, Brilla's sound is a transcendent call and response - creating a live show that is more than a performance; it is an interactive, embodied experience.

artist: The Britles: A Tribute to The Beatles
description: Tribute An acoustic Beatles band that brings the timeless classics of the iconic British band to life with an authentic and captivating energy. Their repertoire includes a wide variety of classic Beatles songs from different eras, as well as deep cuts and many tracks that were never performed live by the Beatles themselves.

Pop | R&B | Soul | Rock The Aardvarks, a Lehigh Valley main stay for over 20 years, was formed by local music scene veterans Mike Rauscher on guitar/vocals (The Armadillos, The Honey Buzzards) and Rod Walls on key/vocals (The Armadillos & The Seamrippers) to continue a unique musical bond that dates back to 1997. Guitarist Jay Morgan (Good Time Charlie) and Drummer Jason Sanita (Wake of Naked) joined the 'Varks in 2003 to help bring their popular Dance/Rock super-sets and song medleys to local venues and events. Over a long journey, they've continued to hone their craft, bringing you the best music from the '70's through present day. Drummer Jason Sanita came back to the band in 2025 with bassist Brenden Hackett (The Honey Buzzards & Rhino Campground) to round out this powerful quintet. Come see them for yourselves..............you won't be disappointed!

venue: Lyrikplatz at Frank Banko Alehouse Cinemas
description: Alternative | Indie | Ambient Walt Kosar is a guitarist, multi-instrumentalist, and composer living in the Pocono Mountain region of Northeastern Pennsylvania. He has a degree in music from Marywood University, is a music educator, performs on a regular basis and leads various musical projects including his solo work and the instrumental band People Mae. Walt has appeared several times in Guitar Player Magazine and his television credits include musical placements on MTV, VH1, CMT, Fox Sports, NBCSN, Discovery and History Channels.   "He understands the fine art of tension and release, an exhilarating composition tactic that many shredders ignore." Guitar Player Magazine   "His ability to establish a meaningful connection with his audience is evidence of his sincere love of music" Viberate   25K Social Media Followers   375K Spotify Streams   1M YouTube Views   Endorsing: DropStrap, SIT Strings, Lekato Music and Rattlesnake Cables

COMEDYPLATZ - THE ICE HOUSE  56 River Street  Come for some laughs in the air-conditioned Charles A. Brown Ice House! Comedy Platz is a standup comedy showcase featuring comics from the Lehigh Valley, Philly, NYC and beyond! Please note, 6 p.m. and 8 p.m. shows will contain adult language and/or situations. Anyone coming in between the ages of 13 – 17 must be accompanied by a parent or guardian. No child 12 or under will be admitted. All performers and staff must adhere to our codes of conduct. 4 p.m. shows are family friendly and are welcome to all ages. Standup Shows:  Friday, July 31: 8 p.m. Saturday, Aug. 1: 4 p.m.*, 6 p.m., 8 p.m. Friday, Aug. 7: 8 p.m. Saturday, Aug. 8: 4 p.m.*, 6 p.m., 8 p.m. Show lineups TBA   *denotes family-friendly show; all other shows will contain adult content and no children 12 and under will be admitted.

Alternative | Pop | Rock Code 201 is a group of friends that brings high energy, good vibes, and rocking jams from across decades and genres. Specializing in Punk, rock, and pop, Code brings interactive fun to any event. Performing old and new crowd pleasers with fire, drive, and passion Code 201 is sure to bring positive vibes to any stage.

artist: Greggie and The Jets: A Tribute to Elton John
venue: The Guardian Life Insurance Company of America Zinzenplatz
description: Tribute Greggie and the Jets catapults you into the heart of Elton John's classic era with a dazzling tribute that captivates fans. This Florida based Elton John Tribute Band's performance will have you singing and dancing as the band takes you on a journey through the decades. Following the original arrangements to reproduce Elton John's classic sound and bring the emotion that is so strongly embedded in the music, Greggie and the Jets delivers the spirit and magic of each track. You won't want to miss this fabulous energetic show!

The perfect adventure for fans of Dungeons & Dragons and Improv Comedy is back, as an all new epic quest is put forth by live audience suggestion and success or failure hinges upon the roll of the dice. A Game Master and an adventure party made up of Improvisers will perform their scenes live while the audience provides suggestions on each twist and turn of the journey. Expect wild characters, magical mishaps and surprises lurking around every corner of the dungeon as the show unfolds on the spot with audience participation and a giant 20-sided-die guiding the way. This show is ALL CHARACTER, NO SHEET.  Marc Lombardi The host and Game Master, Marc Lombardi, is a longtime Dungeons & Dragons player and DM and has been a SteelStacks House Team improviser (Ransom Note, Good Clean Fight, Hot Gym, Spoke & Mirrors, Wizard Police) since 2023. He also teaches Improv Techniques for TTRPGs and LARPs at local gaming conventions. *Note: This show will contain adult language and/or situations. Anyone coming in between the ages of 13 and 17 must be accompanied by a parent or guardian. No child 12 or under will be admitted.
Latin International Salsa singer with more than 30 years experience, Great stage presence and dynamic Salsa Band.

Blues Folk | Americana | Alt-Country Dina Hall is a performing songwriter and recording artist, rooted in Bethlehem, Pa. She blends folk, rock, blues, and alt-country into a dynamic amalgam of Americana music, featuring her resonant, familiar voice on each song. Hall has solidly established a decades-long career as a performing songwriter, honing her craft in intimate listening rooms and bringing that spark to large theater stages and music festivals. Hall's songwriting and performance can be reminiscent of the enigmatic storytelling of Dylan and Springsteen, combined with the wildly feminist passion of Melissa Etheridge and Brandi Carlile, and the powerful whispers of Emmylou Harris and Tracy Chapman.   "...she blew me away...vocally, she has a second gear to her voice." - Mike Greenblatt, The Aquarian   "...a roaming Americana spirit, a raw rootsy rock strut, and an introspective folk storytelling quality." - Tom Hilton, Aldora Britain Records   "So Good." - Aubrey Plaza, American actress, comedian, and producer

artist: There, There: A Tribute to Radiohead
description: Tribute  There, There is a New York City-based Radiohead tribute act, playing songs from throughout the band's iconic multi-decade catalogue. The band, formed in the late summer of 2017, is a diverse mix of music veterans and newcomers to the NYC music scene.     There, There is: Joe Edelmann (known for his Radiohead-centric YouTube channel) on lead vocals, guitar and keyboards, Ben Shin (formerly of well-known NYC Pink Floyd Tribute, Us Not Them) on lead guitars, vocals percussion and keyboards, Colin Mahoney (formerly of The Plain Janes) on drums and percussion, Jay Lynch (veteran of multiple NYC original and cover bands) on bass and Cory Furlong (of Burne Holiday) on guitars, vocals, Kaoss Pads, and percussion.

venue: Air Products Americaplatz at Levitt Pavilion SteelStacks
description: Tribute Kid Charlemagne was founded in 2025 by a collective of top-tier musicians from Philadelphia and South Jersey, united by a shared obsession with the sophisticated grooves, sharp lyrics, and timeless songwriting of Steely Dan. The band's members bring decades of professional experience, having performed and recorded with an extraordinary roster of legendary artists including Billy Paul, Freddie Jackson, Irene Cara, The Delfonics, Boyz II Men, Gladys Knight & The Pips, Russell Thompkins Jr. & The New Stylistics, Harold Melvin & The Blue Notes, The O'Jays, Teddy Pendergrass, Phyllis Hyman, Patti LaBelle, and The Temptations. Kid Charlemagne approaches the music of Donald Fagen and Walter Becker with deep respect and meticulous attention to detail-honoring the original arrangements while delivering the energy and musicality of a world-class live band. From jazz-inflected harmonies to deep pocket grooves, Kid Charlemagne captures the sound, spirit, and swagger that made Steely Dan iconic.

Rock Lady White Rat is a crushing hard rock power trio based out of the Lehigh Valley PA region. With captivating song writing, melodic harmonies, and a dynamic range of sounds varying from metal to jazz, Lady White Rat's music offers a sense of familiarity while incorporating a fresh unique sound uncommon in the scene. With emphasis on the live experience, Lady White Rat performs high energy chaotic live shows with the ability to command a crowd and make your head bang for the entirety of their set.

venue: The Guardian Life Insurance Company of America Zinzenplatz
description: Alternative | Indie | Singer-Songwriter Alana Mars is a queer alternative pop musician based out of Bethlehem, PA. With her holy trinity as guidance (Lana del Rey, Florence + The Machine and Stevie Nicks) Alana's conversational lyric style feels like you are reading directly out of her diary (and in some cases you are) while her complimentary guitar playing helps to paint the picture and bring it all to life. Prior to moving to Pennsylvania, Alana had a decade-long career in Denver, CO performing at local venues and festivals as well as being featured on local radio stations like Indie 102.3 (Colorado Public Radio) and KTCL 93.3. Along with multiple national tours and numerous music festivals under her belt, Mars released her debut EP "The Prologue" in May 2024 which is available on all streaming platforms.

Genre: Folk/Americana | Pop | Singer/Songwriter   Singer/songwriter, guitarist, polyglot, world traveler, perpetual learner, aspiring peacemaker.    There are a lot of ways to describe Matt.    As a singer/songwriter, he's released five full-length studio albums, opened for British legend Joan Armatrading, was named a 2015 Artist of the Year by Concerts In Your Home, played for audiences in the U.S., Canada, Europe, and Australia, been heard on national television, and has garnered over 10 million streams on Spotify and over 3 million views on YouTube. His genre-nebulous style is characterized by poignant, thoughtful lyrics and soothing yet dynamic vocals.    Now based in the Lehigh Valley, Pennsylvania, by way of Connecticut, New York City, Italy, Peru, Nashville, and Costa Rica, Matt is always awaiting and seeking new ways to inspire and comfort audiences around the world.

artist: Liquid Smoke: Classics from the 50s to Today
description: Rock Liquid Smoke is an acoustic trio playing classic rock covers from the 60's thru 2000's. The band features Bobby Ventura on guitar and vocals, Steve Wycoff on guitar & bass and Jay Wycoff on the cajon. Always known around the area for a wide spectrum of classic rock tunes, the trio was a Musikfest favorite last year and glad to be back again in 2026!

Folk | Americana | Indie What's in a name? For Couldn't Be Happiers, the whole damn thing. This award-winning folk-rock/Americana duo enjoys every moment performing together, and it's pretty contagious. The duo's playful "Violent Femmes meets Johnny and June" vibe and onstage chemistry all but dare you not to enjoy yourself. The CBH repertoire includes stories about the obsessive drive of a Bigfoot hunter, the misadventures of a plastic bag, and the end of the world from global warming. Their homespun harmonies and powerful vocals will take you from church to punk club to Opry and back.

Folk | Americana | Polka | World Fritz's Polka Band (FPB) was formed in 1978 by lead accordionist, the late Fred Scherz Sr., and his eight-year old son, Fritz, for whom the band was named. Sadly, Fred passed away on November 14, 2009, but FPB has vowed to carry on his legacy! Playing everything from modern-style polka to country to rock and even blues, FPB performs an eclectic mix of musical styles! FPB breaks the polka stereotype, appeals to all ages and is the only polka band to perform at a Woodstock Festival (Woodstock '99)! On October 7, 2010, FPB was inducted into the Syracuse Area Music Hall of Fame! In 2011, FPB had two different songs appear on 'Breaking Bad' during the fourth season. On November 25, 2023, FPB namesake, Fritz Scherz was inducted into the National Cleveland-Style Polka Hall of Fame!   FPB's 20th recording, "The Hands Of Time" (winner of Syracuse Area Music Hall of Fame Award Best Recording: Other Styles!) released October 1, 2021 features 11 original songs and one cover song.

Street Performer Lucy Juggles' one-woman comedy juggling show is a unique blend of southern charm, extraordinary stunts, and emotional vulnerability. Full of bad jokes, cute tricks, unicycles, and lots of knives, Lucy's Denim & Danger Circus show will delight audiences of all ages!

Street Performer Twisted Rhythm, an award-winning show based out of Clearwater Beach, Florida. We combine high energy breakdancing with signature comedic stylings through nonstop, laugh-out-loud moments and jaw dropping moves that leave the audience on their feet.

Children's/Family | Indie | Puppetry Jumpin' Jamie plays "kindie rock" for all ages! From 2013-2019, Jumpin' Jamie was best known as the Dinosaur Troubadour at Field Station: Dinosaurs (Secaucus and Leonia, NJ), But with the release of their debut album, "Kookie," in 2018 the pop rocker dove headfirst into the kindie scene with a bold, confident, and undeniably fun collection. In 2020 and 2022, the follow up albums "Never Mind The Blocks, Here's Jumpin' Jamie" and "Mosaic" were released with the albums amassing over a half million streams on Spotify. Jamie has played thousands of shows nationally in 18 states (and counting!) at everything from birthday parties for a crowd of 12, to a stadium for crowds of 12,000 (Citi Field, NYC) and everything in between including Wizard World Comic Con (Chicago and Philadelphia), and Wolf Trap National Park for the Performing Arts (Virginia).

Funk | Jazz | Latin  Pam's first singing gig was in Japan in 1980. For the next 40 years in NYC, she explored several musical genres. A highlight was having the opportunity to sing with Richie Havens in 1986 as part of the Tribute to The Lady in the Harbor.  Pam always returned to her love of Jazz and The Great American Songbook. She performed in Cabarets throughout the years. Pam was the lead vocalist in Side B, a 60's cover band from 2010-2016. She sang Jazz standards at the Harvard Club with Bob Dawson, Richie Iacona, Tony Tedesco, Tom Kirchmer and Ron Affif, some of NYC's finest jazz musicians. In 2018 Pam released a CD of Standards called Moonglow. In 2019 her band gigged in May and November at the revered Jazz at Kitano, Jazz Club. A brand new resident of Easton, PA, she has teamed up with established local musicians Joe Mixon, Guitar, Al Kratzer, Bass, and Dave Mohn, Drums.

venue: Lutron Jazz Cabaret Stage at Frank Banko Alehouse Cinemas
description: Alternative | Pop | Rock Allentown, PA natives Kate Pistone (vocals) and Matthew Morrow (piano/arr.) have been friends for over 30 years, having met during high school. They formed Living Rarity in 2024.   Kate completed the 2-year Professional Conservatory program at Atlantic Acting School and earned her B.A. in Storytelling from NYU's Gallatin School of Individualized Study and her M.A. in Arts Administration from Kutztown University. She sings with the popular trio The SwingTime Dolls and has graced stages as a singer and actor across the Lehigh Valley and beyond. Kate is a co-founder of Acting Up, a studio specializing in acting and audition coaching.   Matt earned his PhD in Musicology at the Eastman School of Music and has studied piano since the age of 9. In addition to performing in association with the American Musicological Society and the Nineteenth Century Studies Association, Matt has presented recitals and lectures at Eastman, Bucknell University, and various venues throughout PA and NY.

Classical | Jazz | Contemporary Ava Bloomfield is a composer, classically trained pianist, and teacher from Allentown, Pennsylvania, USA. She is a passionate music educator with over 7 years of private teaching experience. Ava graduated from Lehigh Valley Charter High School for the Arts in 2021, followed by Berklee College of Music online in 2024. She finished her studies with an Advanced Professional Certificate in General Music Studies. Ava has since been a part of many performances and events, including honors recitals, the Piano Guild auditions, and Achievement Awards auditions. She received 1st place in the Friends of Music's "Outstanding Young Artists" competition, and was interviewed on WDIY 88.1, Lehigh Valley's Public Radio. In addition, many of her compositions have been performed and premiered by the Allentown Symphony's chamber musicians, and other organizations from around the country. She continues to compose, perform, and teach private piano lessons to all ages.
