Alternative | Indie Atlassian formed in the winter of 2015 when Nickolas Kossup and Anthony Belcaro began writing acoustic versions of what would become the band's foundation. By 2016, they brought in lead guitarist Aaron Michael Brown (Saint Slumber & Devora), to expand the sound and vision. The final piece came with bassist and creative director Dave Meyers, whose creative vision helped define the band's identity visually and sonically.   Rooted in close collaboration and a shared belief in meaningful music, Atlassian has grown into a standout act in the Lehigh Valley and greater Northeast scene. With emotionally charged songwriting, gritty vocals, and undeniable hooks, their music explores what it means to feel deeply and move through it.   For fans of Kings of Leon, Wilderado, Local Natives, and Briston Maroney

Party/Cover | Rock | Tribute 70's Flashback is comprised of 7 veteran musicians with a true passion for the music who bring all the original excitement of the decade to a new generation and to those who experienced it the first time. From the Eagles & Fleetwood Mac, to Queen & Kansas, to Folk & Disco, 70's Flashback's stellar vocal harmonies and note for note musical recreations deliver every nuance of the original recordings. Their high energy, show stopping performances continue to have audiences on their feet as they experience the decade of the grooviest music ever written.

artist: Improv Show: Tim for Short – Musikfest Edition
description: Laugh along with us, as we play "Whose Line is it Anyway?" style improv games inspired by all your favorite things about Musikfest. Local improv comedy team Tim for Short - and friends - will play fast paced games inspired by audience suggestions. And it's all improvised - so everything is made up on the spot! *Note: This show will contain adult language and/or situations. Anyone coming in between the ages of 13 and 17 must be accompanied by a parent or guardian. No child 12 or under will be admitted.

artist: Brain Damage: A Tribute to Pink Floyd
venue: The Guardian Life Insurance Company of America Zinzenplatz
description: Pop | Rock | Tribute A trip of sight and sound...   Get ready to be blown away by Brain Damage! This phenomenal band has been Shining On the US East Coast for nearly two decades, having formed in 2003. Comprised of seasoned musicians with over 35 years' experience each, Brain Damage flawlessly replicates every nuance of the Pink Floyd catalog. From the haunting Clocks in Time, to the iconic Pig's "talking guitar" lead, to the mesmerizing computer voice in Keep Talking, their attention to detail will leave you astounded. Brain Damage delivers an incredible presentation of sight and sound that will leave you speechless!

Country | Pop | Rock Singer songwriter Stefanie Johnson is native to the Lehigh Valley. Her style ranges from pop artist to rock singer with a slight country timbre as well. Similarly, her music and songwriting approach traverse those same motifs. In addition to the local scene, Stefanie has performed at Nashville's legendary Bluebird Cafe and 12th & Porter, as well as the Rock and Roll of Fame in Cleveland, Ohio. Her songs have been featured in several films most recently including Daniel Roebuck's Saint Nick of Bethlehem and The Hail Mary. She has been performing with her all-star band for many years, featuring her co-writer, multi-instrumentalist/studio owner Brian Anthony, super talented guitarist Michael Anthus and dynamic veteran drummer Tom Chaffier to deliver a mix of country, rock, and pop that is sure to provide something for everyone.

artist: Movement Moves Media Presents: Sin Limite with BezMusiq ft. Hommy FA
description: Latin | Reggaeton

Alternate | Pop mrnoname is the end result of years of musical introspection from songwriter Noah Scheffey and drummer Logan Moyer. Recently releasing their debut album, 'Hallu', a mysterious island that Noah defects to, he realizes the only way that he will be able to escape is if he digs through his mind and truly discovers who he is. It is a self made trial that converses with themes such as existentialism, the yearning to be something greater, the problems in the world and more.

Tribute British Born but American Made, The Brit Pack brings the best of classic British rock music to stages across the USA. Formed by two Brits in NYC, The Brit Pack covers the spectrum of the UK's musical legacy, from the iconic anthems of the sixties to the modern classics of today!        Vocals, Guitar, Keys / Matt Nakoa (US) Guitar, Vocals / Mark Sidney Johnson (UK) Bass, Vocals / Bryan Percivall (US) Drums, Vocals / Will Haywood Smith (UK)

venue: Air Products Americaplatz at Levitt Pavilion SteelStacks
description: Alternative | Rock | World  Igor Yuzov was born in Germany, raised in Ukraine and studied in Russia. He grew up in the former Soviet Union, where folk music was the norm and rock'n'roll was illegal. A rebellious streak, led him to seek out the forbidden music. As soon as it became possible, Igor left Russia for America with his "Folk'n'Roll" band Limpopo, and was personally greeted by Ronald Reagan. In 1993, Limpopo won Ed McMahon's Star Search and their popularity began to blossom. In 1995, Igor dreamed that Elvis Presley came to him and told him to start playing rock'n'roll. Igor and his Russian friends became Red Elvises and gave street performances on Santa Monica's 3rd Street Promenade. As their crowds grew larger, the City of Santa Monica ordered them to discontinue their street performances. Evolving over the years, Igor's music has been labeled "Siberian Surf Rock" which contains humorous lyrics and grooves that forces his audience to dance.

Funk | Pop | R&B | Soul We are Flirtin with the Mob, one of Eastern Pennsylvania's hottest dance bands that keeps audiences going all night long! Whether it's Funk, Motown, R&B, Soul or Pop, we provide that upbeat "Music That Energizes Your Soul!" Featuring a second-to-none powerhouse horn section, smokin' lead vocals, and a rhythm section that lays down the beat and grooves like no other, Flirtin' With the Mob provides something different...not just music, but entertainment. Throw in the audience's favorite tunes, and you have an unforgettable experience that your guests will talk about for years to come. Flirtin' with the Mob has performed across Pennsylvania and the tri-state area. Without a doubt... You will want to be Flirtin With the Mob, too!
Alternative | Party/Cover | Rock We're the Warped Shore from New Jersey, a male and female fronted tribute to to the emo and punk scene of the 90s and 2000s. Check us out at thewarpedshore.com

Jazz | Oldies | Pop Jackie and Les have spent a decade perfecting a musical chemistry that is as enduring as it is captivating.    Les is a seasoned veteran of the stage with more than 40 years of experience. As a master of fingerstyle guitar and a private guitar teacher, his technical skill is matched by his history as a contributing artist to a Grammy-winning project. His sharp sense of humor keeps crowds entertained and laughing between every note.   Jackie is a powerhouse vocalist whose soulful, passionate delivery allows her to navigate a wide range of eras and genres with ease. While she has been singing her entire life, she finds her deepest inspiration in the emotional connection of music-especially when performing for seniors and touching the hearts of those who listen.   Together, they perform an eclectic variety of styles, including:   Jazz and Soul   Pop and Soft Rock   Musical Theater   Whether they are setting a sophisticated, relaxed ambiance or leading a high-energy set that gets the crowd moving

venue: The Guardian Life Insurance Company of America Zinzenplatz
description: Alternative | Pop | Rock Couples Therapy is an energetic rock band bringing you unique and reimagined renditions of all the classics. They feature a blend of rock, pop punk, and alternative music with songs from the 70's to the early 2000's. Some bands who inspire them are Heart, Abba, and Paramore. This group shares a strong love of music and performance. Their energy on stage is palpable to anyone who hears them play.

Alternative | Rock Judah Kim is not special-at least not in his pain or his problems. It's one of many lessons he's learned over a decade of sobriety. This liberating notion has been the key to unlocking his artistic vulnerability. Kim, a proud Korean American from Philadelphia Pa, shares his inner world with the hope that others feel seen, connected and free. Kim's voice and melodies have been described as very "British." He blends the sweetness and accessibility from the likes of Paul McCartney, and mixes it with the conviction and power of 90's Thom Yorke. His music showcases a rich tapestry of Indie Alternative Rock colours akin to Catherine Wheel, The Strokes, Weezer, Oasis, Travis, The Dears, Muse.      Judah Kim is currently at work on a full length album, Everyday Mania. Because of this he is playing a limited run of shows in 2026 including an unplugged appearance at Musikfest 2026

Alternative Kyle L. Edwards is an Allentown-based artist, producer, and creative director deeply rooted in the Lehigh Valley arts scene. As the founder of a true l.o.v.e story., llc and inkwell., an award-winning arts and community space, he develops experiences that blend music, comedy, poetry, and wellness into immersive, community-driven programming.   Kyle has collaborated with organizations including the Philadelphia Eagles, FOX Sports, and Amazon, while also leading impactful local initiatives focused on public art and youth engagement. His mural work and creative programming often center on self-expression, connection, and personal growth.   A PCA rostered artist, Kyle serves in leadership roles across several arts and civic organizations, helping shape Allentown's cultural landscape. Through his work, he aims to create spaces where art is accessible, transformative, and rooted in community.

artist: All The Kings Men: A Jolly Joe Timmer Tribute

description: Street Performer The Cate Great Show combines high-level circus and original comedy into a sharp, witty, big-hearted show that plays to all audiences. She is an award-winning twenty year veteran of circus, stage, and street. Trained at the Quebec City Circus School she's performed in over 11 different countries including: Australia, New Zealand, Dubai, Italy, and the UK as well as most of the US and Canada.

Street Performer | Juggler | Comedian The Flaming Ginger is a fast paced comedy and juggling show. From ground to sky he brings the laughs and backs them up with skills and thrills. Winner of both national and international performance competitions, he will quickly become a highlight of your day.

venue: Lutron Jazz Cabaret Stage at Frank Banko Alehouse Cinemas
description: Blues | Jazz | R&B | Soul Velvet Salgado is a piano-vocal performer blending modern pop, jazz-influenced standards, and soulful originals into intimate, expressive sets. A U.S. Navy veteran, Velvet began performing publicly while in service, including singing the national anthem for command ceremonies. After leaving the Navy, she worked in professional theater in San Diego before returning to the Northeast, where she now performs throughout the NEPA and Lehigh Valley areas at private events, and curated dining experiences.   Known for her emotive delivery and conversational stage presence, Velvet creates performances that feel personal, warm, and immersive : whether reimagining contemporary favorites or sharing original music. Her work is rooted in storytelling, connection, and authenticity, making each performance feel both polished and deeply human.

Folk | Americana | Indie Cass Noelle is a Lehigh Valley native with a powerful and angelic voice whose strength as a songwriter comes from her ability to set to music her perseverance through hardship and finding hope where it feels hopeless. Audiences are often moved and connect with her music as it helps them feel that they are not alone.   With influences like Brandi Carlile, Jewel, and the Cranberries, her songs leave an enduring imprint on listeners.    Her EP, Joy Will Come, is available to stream on all major platforms.

Children's/Family Two of a Kind is David & Jenny Heitler-Klevans, an award-winning husband-wife musical duo based in the Philadelphia area, specializing in interactive music for children and families. Two of a Kind gets audiences of all ages involved in the show, through singing, movement, sign language, lyrics-on-the-spot, puppets and more! Two of a Kind has released 10 CDs and 1 DVD for kids, garnering over 20 national awards. David & Jenny have also written a musical for kids called "The World is Not Your Garbage Can." Publishers' Weekly calls Two of a Kind "a one-of-a-kind find!"

venue: The Guardian Life Insurance Company of America Zinzenplatz
description: Country | Pop | Christian Music that's good for the soul!   The Valley Collective of the Lehigh Valley, PA, is a positive and uplifting contemporary band, playing music with inclusive themes of love and hope. We play both mainstream pop/country and Christian music, depending on the venue or event.   Our members either have served or are currently serving in worship bands in various churches around the valley. The Valley Collective grew out of a pursuit to spread good news beyond the walls of a church. The Valley Collective is not affiliated with any particular church or denomination.

Country | Rock | Gospel Jasmine Roudebush, of Butler, Pennsylvania, is the next up and coming country music sensation. At only 16 years old, Jasmine has performed in front of many crowds. Her love for singing started at the age of 11 when she sang Anne Wilson's "My Jesus" at her beloved local church. From there it grew to various state and local church events, National Anthem performances, and several public events in PA, OH, KY, SC, TN and more to come. Her love of country, country-rock, and southern gospel combined with her powerful onstage presence and dynamic vocals have her looking forward to her singing future!

venue: Lyrikplatz at Frank Banko Alehouse Cinemas
description: Folk | Americana | Indie | Pop Ella Patterson is a singer-songwriter from Lehigh Valley, PA whose music blends indie, folk, and pop influences. Her songs focus on honest storytelling, and relatable lyrics drawn from personal experiences and everyday moments.   Music has always been a focal point of her life and sharing her music with others brings her so much joy. Ella is excited to expand her live performances and connect with new audiences. She looks forward to bringing her warm, intimate style of songwriting to the stage at Music Fest 2026.

Alternative | Folk | Americana The Spine Stealers are an eerie folk band fronted by singer-songwriter Emma O'Shea, whose songs conjure dark lakes, brain-burned nostalgia and fractured memories. In just three years, they've etched their name into the Midwest region's folk scene, quietly amassing a devoted following. In their first year, 2023, they won the Blue Ox Band Competition and were on the official lineup in 2025. They have been featured on Gems On VHS playlists and have supported acts such as Chris Acker, Basia Bulat, The Last Revel, Them Coulee Boys, Dead Horses, Wild Horses, Charlie Parr, Palmyra and Arcadian Wild to name a few. The band's devotion to national touring and the release of their second EP, Yellow Feather, has solidified their momentum.

Rock We're a four-piece rock and roll cover band built on energy, heart, and connection. From the stage to the crowd, we create a true "part of the band" experience - singing together, moving together, and living every moment out loud. At our core is a special bond: our guitarist and our lead singer are father and daughter, bringing a lifetime of chemistry and love for music into every harmony and solo. Backed by a tight rhythm section, we thrive on pushing ourselves, constantly adding new songs to keep every show fresh. Offstage, we're close friends, and that friendship fuels our sound. Alongside us is Nina, our marketing manager and one of our biggest supporters, helping share our story. When you come to a show, you're not just watching - you're joining us.

venue: Lyrikplatz at Frank Banko Alehouse Cinemas
description: Indie | Pop | Rock Described as "Familiar but different", Pat knew from age 8 that he wanted to be a songwriter. A lead guitarist by trade, Pat's passion for songwriting led him to the Berklee College of Music and Trenton State College, with classical guitar and voice. Pat developed as a singer with bluesy grit to power pop with impressive ease.  Based in Asbury Park, NJ, Pat recently signed with with Chess Music Management out of Nashville. He performs throughout the NJ, PA, NY region, and has opened for National acts Steve Forbert and Damon Johnson. He currently hosts a monthly Pat Foran and Friends Showcase at the Asbury Park Brewery featuring vibrant New Jersey Shore music scene original music. He also plays lead guitar for The Nick Clemons Band.  His newest single release, "Better World", is available on all streaming platforms. His next single "Comfort" will be released in May 2026. Several more singles are planned for release building toward a full album titled "Foran Returns".

description: Jazz | Rock | World Waterfront Blue blends soulful vocals, smooth harmonies, and acoustic-electric fingerstyle guitar into an upbeat mix of gypsy jazz, classic rock, and Latin rhythms. Featuring original songs about life and love alongside creatively reimagined standards, their rhythm-driven sound connects naturally with audiences of all ages.

artist: Kat Rivers and the Second Sight
venue: The Guardian Life Insurance Company of America Zinzenplatz
description: Blues | Rock KAT RIVERS AND THE SECOND SIGHT is a Philadelphia-based blues rock band known for their show-stopping live performances, powerhouse vocals, and tight musicianship. Led by front woman Kat Rivers and featuring core members Ric Haas (guitar), and Ava Esrich (bass), their music showcases the jaw-dropping range of Rivers' vocal style while incorporating the raw rock and roll edge of the Second Sight. Their music has invoked comparisons to Led Zeppelin, Grace Potter and the Nocturnals, Velvet Revolver, and Heart.  ​ Shortly after the marking of the band's 1st anniversary, Kat Rivers and the Second Sight released their debut 4-song EP, "Deception". The EP asserts the band's blues rock sound while incorporating influences of funk, jazz, country, and metal. Also in 2025, the group opened for Ally Venable, Jax Hollow, and Magnolia Boulevard at the Sellersville Theater.

Pop | Rock Formerly of The Aardvarks, Ted Donatelli swaps the drum kit for a piano and an acoustic guitar. Join Teddy for an intimate solo performance, featuring rock and pop hits from the 70's, 80's, and 90's.

Latin | Salsa Born in Bethlehem Pennsylvania and raised in Patillas Puerto Rico, DJ Flex-It is an experienced and dedicated DJ with over 28 years in the music and entertainment industry. His passion for music, combined with his ability to read and energize a crowd, has made him a respected presence at private events, clubs, weddings, community celebrations, and special occasions.   Drawing inspiration from both his Pennsylvania roots and Puerto Rican culture, DJ Flex-It delivers a unique blend of professionalism, versatility, and high-energy entertainment to every event. Known for his reliability, strong work ethic, and ability to create unforgettable experiences, he takes pride in providing music that brings people together and keeps audiences engaged from start to finish.

Party/Cover | Pop | Tribute The Class of '84 is an all 80's tribute band out of Philadelphia playing all your favorite 80's hits. They span all genres of 80's music including pop, rock, dance, and hip-hop. From Madonna and Whitney to Bon Jovi and Prince, the Class of '84 has a high-energy show that will keep you going from the first gnarly note to the last tubular beat. Come celebrate the most radical decade of music with the Class of '84.

She went to arts Academy and charter arts growing up teaching herself piano and guitar and falling more in love with singing. After high school, Hannah went to open mics and got involved in the music scene and started to play her own gigs. Hannah Noel plays in the Poconos, NJ, Philly, Lehigh Valley, Jersey Shore. Hannah Noel also has a band, which they play festivals locally. Hannah Noel does pop/rock/country/indie music from 70s to today. Her influences include Kacey Muscgraves, Miley Cyrus, Lizzy Mcalpine, and Ariana Grande. Hannah Noel has done music full-time for four years now since she was 20 years old. Hannah Noel also released her first EP in 2021. More music is said to be released in 2027.

Country | Rock Erin Kelly's skilled guitar playing and powerhouse vocals define her Country and Rock roots. She has opened up for major artists including Hunter Hayes, Aaron Lewis, and Frankie Ballard. Performing in stadiums including Madison Square Garden to Citizens Bank Park, she has captivated audiences with both her original music and covers. Erin's rendition of the National Anthem has been heard at major and minor league stadiums across the region. Her experience in performing the National Anthem gave her the privilege of singing for General Colin Powell and President George W. Bush. Erin continues to work with producer Rich Herring of the Little River Band on her original music.

Alternative | Pop | Rock The Band Palm is an alt rock band from New Jersey whose music is charged with electricity and spirituality; a feeling that you can't shake. With two leading female vocalists, and foundational manpower, The Band Palm creates an experience that packs a punch. They perform across the tri-state area, with roots in Asbury Park, NJ, and the Rutgers University music scene as their home-base. Their live shows leave the audience feeling invigorated, seen, and part of a movement. With palms wide open, they welcome you to join their journey.

venue: The Guardian Life Insurance Company of America Zinzenplatz

description: Alternative | Indie | Rock Wagon is a four-piece femme band hailing from Philadelphia, PA. Their sound is predominantly alternative and indie rock, but they are inspired by folk rock as well. Wagon was formed in 2023 when members met as students at Temple University. They love sharing music with their community and friends and enjoy collaborating in diverse artist spaces. Their music encourages dancing and a good time!

venue: Lyrikplatz at Frank Banko Alehouse Cinemas
description: Jazz | R&B | Soul | Rock Jon Fadem is a guitarist who plays a mixture of rock, soul, jazz, and funk, using a looper to create unique textures with many layers of guitar, incorporating grooves and improvisation. He is lead guitarist for the bands Start Making Sense: Talking Heads Tribute and Life After Dead: Grateful Dead Tribute. During his solo shows he often performs music by The Grateful Dead, Stevie Wonder, The Who, Led Zeppelin, Jimi Hendrix, The Beatles, Bill Withers, David Bowie, Otis Redding, Allman Brothers, Prince, Radiohead and much more, as well as his own originals. His recent album of all-original instrumental songs, 'Thankful,' was released nationally by Label 51/Flatiron Recordings, and is currently available on all online platforms and streaming services. Jon was nominated Best Guitarist in the Lehigh Valley Music Awards for six consecutive years.

artist: Dominican Festival Presents: El Ritmo de Quisqueya featuring Aneudy Puello y su Grupo de Bachata
description: Bachata Aneudy Puello is a Dominican singer, songwriter, and sound engineer from Gurabo, Santiago, Dominican Republic. With over 30 years of experience in the music industry, he has built a unique career that combines technical expertise in music production with a deep passion for bachata.   He began his journey at age 14 working in radio, where he gained valuable experience and connections within the Dominican music scene. Over the years, he worked as a sound engineer for renowned artists including Luis Vargas, Elvis Martínez, Frank Reyes, Joe Veras, Henry Santos, El Chaval de la Bachata, and Fefita La Grande.   As a recording artist, Aneudy has released songs such as La Tortolita, the album Black Cosas (2024), and the single Camino a los 50 (2025). His music reflects the traditional essence of bachata while bringing a fresh and authentic style to the genre.   Currently, Aneudy continues creating new music and establishing himself as one of the promising voices of contemporary bachata.

Alternative | Funk | Rock George Hrab is a multi-instrumentalist, singer, songwriter, story teller, science advocate, producer, composer, & vigilant defender of the Theory of Gravity. He's written and produced nine independent albums and a concert DVD; published two books; recorded over 950 episodes of the award-winning Geologic Podcast; was the drummer and musical director with The Philadelphia Funk Authority for twenty four years and hosts the concert/lecture series Seven Songs with George Hrab on YouTube. Recruiting four incredible musicians, he's formed The George HraBand featuring Vinnie Puccio on bass, Eric Kenlin on drums and vocals, Kiera Wilhelm on vocals and percussion, and CJ Steinway on keyboards. This quintet matches George's eclectic compositional style and masterfully plays a range of genres from rock to R&B, funk to jazz, and prog to swing. Combining humor, exquisite musicianship, fabulous harmonies, catchy originals, and surprising covers, The George HraBand is not to be missed!

venue: Lutron Jazz Cabaret Stage at Frank Banko Alehouse Cinemas
description: Jazz | Pop | Great American Songbook The trio's vast array of musical influence and experience create a singular style and passion that endears them quickly to audiences. In addition to the multi-faceted ear-appeal with saxophones, keyboard, trumpet, clarinet, flute, harmonica, melodica and various percussion techniques, Dolcetto's (Italian wine-"sweet one") blend of Glenn and Deb and Jeff's vocal and harmonies is sure to please your musical palate. From jazz clubs and restaurants to weddings and corporate events, Dolcetto is always exploring new ways to create musical reviews of Standards, Smooth Jazz, Pop, Blues, Swing, Great American Songbook tunes, and even a little Dixieland.

venue: Wind Creek Steel Stage at PNC Plaza
description: with special guest The Click Five Yellowcard Yellowcard meant it when they said goodbye. The lights dimmed on one of the most beloved pop-punk and alt-rock bands of the 2000s with intention and authenticity. Wrapping things up with a farewell tour, Yellowcard exited the “right” way, with grace, appreciation, and finality. But the story wasn't complete. Legacy cracked the door. Healing blew it wide open. Riding a resurgence that saw the global Ocean Avenue 20th anniversary tour featured in Forbes and a reconciliation that put all four members at peace with their legacy and each other, Yellowcard just made the most ambitious and emotionally resonant record of their career. Better Days, the band's first album in nearly a decade, was produced by blink-182's Travis Barker, who also played drums on every track. Better Days is an unflinching reflection on gratitude, forgiveness, perspective, and purpose. Once ubiquitous on MTV and the Billboard Hot 100, the Vans Warped Tour veterans, whose first two albums produced double-platinum and gold title tracks, sound fully recharged and revitalized in 2025. William Ryan Key, Sean Mackin, Ryan Mendez, and Josh Portman have never sounded stronger. Their first release with powerhouse label Better Noise Music, Better Days is Yellowcard's testimony that healing is a process, growth is nonlinear, and sometimes the best chapter opens after the supposed ending. This isn't just a return. It's a reckoning. And this time, Yellowcard is ready. Taking Back Sunday Taking Back Sunday, who released their eighth studio album 152 in late 2023, often refer to themselves as the ‘luckiest guys you will meet.' The new album, featuring 10 intensely vulnerable and absorbing new tracks was delivered with fresh ambition and a newfound purpose. It stands among the most genuinely reflective and emotionally pure efforts of Taking Back Sunday's illustrious career. Starting out just hoping to release at least one album and go on tour, the band has since sold millions of albums, has multiple tracks with streams hitting the multiple hundred million mark, toured the world several times over, performed at all of the biggest festivals and are still always looking forward. Never ones to rest on their prior accomplishments or impressive back catalogue they are always striving to make something that they hope folks can find a little piece of themselves in. “Music is there to bring you together with like-minded people and get a little lost. For us, the songs from 152 have a life and energy all their own. It would make us the happiest if we can all get lost in it together.” Partner  Media Partner

Jazz | Street Performer | New Orleans Friday and Saturday nights, the Big Easy Easton Brass turns Main St. into Bourbon St. as they bring Mardi Gras to Musikfest!!! Open to all ages and skill levels, this community band is bringing a New Orleans tradition to the streets of Easton. A Second Line parade is not one you just watch go by, it's one you participate in. Walk along, Dance along, Sing along, Shake a Tambourine, Fill the Streets with Bubbles or even learn to play an instrument and jump on in, this band wants to blur the line between spectator and participant. Free to join, rehearsals are at the Easton Area Community Center at 901 Washington St.

description: Party/Cover | Rock Cunningham & Associates is a rock n roll cover band led by former Bethlehem Mayor and current Lehigh Valley economic development leader Don Cunningham. The band features a lineup of Lehigh Valley veteran musicians playing FM radio hits of the '60s, '70s, & '80s, including John Bloys on lead guitar, Rick Repsher on keyboards, and Vern Mobley on drums. A Musikfest favorite, the band has played the festival for more than 20 years, often performing tribute sets to The Rolling Stones, Bruce Springsteen and The E Street Band or delivering non-stop, party rock n' roll sets. Cunningham & Associates is a regular at Lehigh Valley festivals and special events, and performs often at ArtsQuest and the Wind Creek Casino. In his final Lehigh Valley performance at Easton's State Theater, rock n roll legend Chuck Berry used Cunningham & Associates as his opening act.

Tribute The Taxmen are an established Beatles tribute act based in Northeastern Pennsylvania (NEPA) that was started in 2019 by a group of 5 'Beatles mega fans'. Although we don't act or dress just like them, our goal is to perform their music as close to how it is on the record without using any prerecorded tracks creating an all live, high energy performance.    The 5 members are Nick Montini (vocals/guitar), Patrick Cadden (vocals/keys/harmonica), Ryan Witman (vocals/drums), Jake Waxmonsky (vocals/guitar), Zach Jones (vocals/bass).   2022's Tribute Act of the Year in NEPA's Steamtown Music Awards.

Children's/Family | Street Performer | Percussion Orbital is a percussion-centric music entertainment group located in Bethlehem, PA. The group features various drumline style routines, choreographed percussion shows and even bagpipes. The group believes in empowering musicians and creating jaw-dropping live musical performances.      Orbital Drumline was founded in April of 2018 by a group of five friends. With a set of used drums we found on Facebook Marketplace and a dream, we set out to create an entertainment percussive experience like no other. Hundreds of shows later - we are still going strong!      The group is made up entirely of Liberty High School alumni and former Grenadier Band Members and almost all of their head drummers from 2017-2025. We are proud of our Bethlehem roots and have received training and mentorship from world renowned musicians and percussionists like Stu Warmington, Tyler Fry, and members of the Red Hot Chili Pipers.

venue: The Guardian Life Insurance Company of America Zinzenplatz
description: Country | Folk | Americana Chloe Kimes is a Michigan born singer, songwriter and bandleader currently based in Nashville, TN. She fronts a spirited alt-country outfit and has spent over a decade independently touring and releasing music. Kimes has become known for her powerhouse vocals, dynamic storytelling, and high energy band, traveling the country in her trusty van. She's opened shows for the likes of Brent Cobb, Lola Kirke and Jelly Roll and put thousands of miles in the making of friends and fans alike with her music. Her early accolades include a spot on NPR Music's Top Ten Nashville Artists on the Rise following the 2022 release of her well loved debut album. "It's the early marks of a great Americana storyteller-in-the-making, cut from a cloth reminiscent of contemporary roots heroes like Lucinda Williams." (Johnathan Frahm, For Folk's Sake).

Alternative | Indie | Rock The band Just is an indie/alternative band, based in the heart of Bethlehem, Pennsylvania. Founded in 2017, the band is comprised of a four piece unit featuring Dylan Sarkozy (guitar and vocals), Jordan Shames (bass and vocals), Aadam Ameerally (lead guitar), and Tyler Lahman (drums). Their sound derives from the early 2000s rock anthems, with inspiration from The Strokes, as well as the later modern indie works of Car Seat Headrest and Catfish and the Bottlemen.   Just is an active member of the Lehigh Valley's thriving DIY music scene. The band has also been expanding their playing horizons outside of their hometown since 2017. Their energetic live performances have become a staple at local venues like The Icehouse, The Funhouse, and the legendary Musikfest. Whether headlining or sharing a stage, Just brings the raw energy that has captivated audiences from Bethlehem and beyond.   They recently performed at Archer Music Hall in Allentown, PA opening for Dublin's own, Inhaler.

description: Blues | Folk | Americana | Jazz Maria Woodford brings together the grit of the blues, the storytelling of folk, and the improvisation of jazz in music that feels both timeless and personal. Woodford has built a reputation for emotionally resonant performances and for surrounding herself with inventive, accomplished players. With her soul-reaching voice, thoughtful songwriting, and dynamic live presence, Maria Woodford creates a live experience that's both intimate and full of energy. Audiences can expect an evening of music that bridges genres and speaks directly to the heart. Maria is a 3rd place winner in the John Lennon Songwriting Contest for her song, "Travellin' On", a semi-finalist in the International Blues Competition, a Jim Beam Grant Recipient, and has the honor of being the first, and one of only two, artists to be granted mechanical rights to Nina Simone's "Do I Move You," which is given only to those artists hand picked by Simone's daughter according to how well their rendition honors the song.

Jazz | Latin | World Clave Legacy is predominantly a Latin-Jazz & Salsa Fusion faith-based band. They are based in Lehigh Valley, PA. The name "Clave Legacy" signifies the heritage of the clave which is the key of Latin music. Their main purpose is to keep this music alive, with a gospel mindset. Clave Legacy has performed for the Miller Symphony Orchestra Parranda, local restaurants, weddings, and festivals.

venue: Air Products Americaplatz at Levitt Pavilion SteelStacks
description: Alternative | Indie | Rock Hailing from Central New Jersey, The Brothers Union blend emotional alternative rock with massive hooks, raw honesty, and the kind of energy built for packed rooms and late-night drives. Fronted by brothers Mike and Sean O'Reilly alongside Alec Wagstaff and Tony Chrysanthopoulos, the band channels influences from modern emo, indie rock, and early-2000s alternative into a sound that feels both nostalgic and fresh.   Known for their cathartic live shows and emotionally charged songwriting, The Brothers Union write about the pressure of growing up, feeling stuck, mental battles, relationships, and chasing purpose when life feels uncertain. Their music balances vulnerability with explosive guitars and anthemic choruses designed to connect with anyone trying to find their place.   With a growing catalog of releases including "Out of My Head," the band is continuing to build momentum throughout the Northeast while expanding their audience online and on stage.

Rock | Britpop | New Wave With their posh threads, cheeky wit, and top notch talent, The Wankers are the Ultimate Britpop/New Wave Experience! Blues | Rock | Southern Rock Chasing Stars was formed in 2022 by lead singer / guitarist Tommy Dimovski. He had success as a solo artist with his own original music, but decided it was time to start a band and recruited two other talented musicians like himself that share the same love for rock and roll music. With a catalog of songs that range from foot-stomping anthems to reflective ballads, the band's live shows are a testament to their musical versatility and energy. Their music draws on themes of struggle, resilience, hope, and the pursuit of something greater-whether it's chasing a dream, chasing redemption, or chasing the stars themselves. The band's music is not only a tribute to Southern rock, but also a reflection of the modern day-where the old meets the new and where a fresh generation of music fans can appreciate the roots of rock 'n' roll while embracing the innovation of today.

Blues BC Blue began as a recommendation and vision of Michael Cloeren (promoter and organizer/director of the Pocono and Pennsylvania Blues Festivals) in 2022 to combine the Blues resumes of "Chicago" Carl Snyder, Joe Mac and MoMojo Recording artist Bev Conklin ("BC"). During 2022, the trio also performed in a 5-piece band format. BC finally scaled the group down to a quartet, inviting Mitch Shelly (former bassist with BC & The Blues Crew and The BC Combo) on upright bass. BC Blue covers decades of Blues based on their individual and combined experiences. Members of this band are among the region's highly respected and regarded musicians from Chicago, Brooklyn, New Orleans and Quakertown PA. The chemistry of this Lehigh Valley PA based quartet delivers on the spectrum of authentic and nothing but the Blues.

artist: Strawberry Fields: The Ultimate Beatles Tribute Act
description: Tribute  Strawberry Fields is the closest you can get to seeing the Beatles perform live! These four acclaimed musicians deliver a unique theatrical experience.  They take audiences of all ages on a chronological journey through the Beatles timeless catalogue.  The use of costumes, vintage instrumentation and amplification delivers a truly authentic audio and visual experience. Strawberry Fields consists of cast members from the Broadway and touring company of the hit musical, Beatlemania,  They have performed throughout the country and around the world,  most notably at Shea Stadium, Citifield, Fenway Park and Yankee Stadium and the NJ Prudential Center.  Strawberry FIelds also holds the record for the longest running Beatles show on Broadway, having performed the legendary Beatles Brunch for 18 consecutive years at BB Kings in Times Square, NYC. In April 2021, Strawberry Fields began their newest weekly residency at City Winery NYC, now running a total of 5 years with 300 performances.

description: Alternative | Rock | Pop Covers "As You Were" is the U.S. Army's Musical Outreach Team and the only national touring rock band, based out of Fort Knox, Kentucky. The band was created to showcase the talents of highly skilled musicians currently serving as active-duty Soldiers in the U.S. Army. The current members who form the band "As You Were" perform contemporary rock, pop music, and original music at national events and high schools across the United States to build awareness of the career opportunities available while serving in the U.S. Army. Our mission is to show you can still follow your passions while serving in the U.S. Army.

Alternative | Folk | Americana | Indie Twelve String is an acoustic songwriting duo who bring rich harmonies and guitars technique to both original compositions as well as countless songs from popular artists of the 20th century.

artist: Whole Lotta Led: A Tribute to Led Zeppelin
description: Rock | Tribute Whole Lotta Led is an unforgettable tribute to the legendary Led Zeppelin.    Starting as a passion project for a group of like-minded musicians, their shared vision became a high-voltage experiment to meticulously recreate the magic and unmistakable sound of this rock legend. A powerhouse of talent with soaring vocals, epic guitar riffs, melodic bass lines, and thunderous drums, they set out to reproduce the raw power of a Zeppelin show minus the flashy 70's attire.   The impressive range and resonance of Gregg Zandanel's vocals and jaw-dropping musicianship of Mark Scimeca, Bob Evraets, John Straley, and Leo Kline III, Whole Lotta Led delivers an epic, energetic rock show. Prepare to be amazed, swept up by nostalgia, and yearning for the quintessential "one more song!"    The performance is so convincing, it is like history has come alive. Close your eyes and you will be transported to another era. Open your eyes and see a group of guys and an audience having the time of their lives!

Witness their hard work and talent come to fruition and rock out with us this summer!

Polka | World John Stevens Doubleshot formed together in June of 1995. Since that time the band has performed all across the US and beyond. Performing on numerous Television shows including: Pennsylvania Polka (WVIA TV), The Jolly Joe Timmer Show (RCN CABLE), Let's Polka (WSKG TV) & The Bethlehem Musikfest (Service Electric Cable) The band has also been on 3 Polka Cruises and currently has 18 cd releases. Performing Original and traditional polka music, John Stevens' Doubleshot continue to make people dance and sing at every performance.

Street Performer | Juggler | Comedian The Flaming Ginger is a fast paced comedy and juggling show. From ground to sky he brings the laughs and backs them up with skills and thrills. Winner of both national and international performance competitions, he will quickly become a highlight of your day.

Street Performer The Cate Great Show combines high-level circus and original comedy into a sharp, witty, big-hearted show that plays to all audiences. She is an award-winning twenty year veteran of circus, stage, and street. Trained at the Quebec City Circus School she's performed in over 11 different countries including: Australia, New Zealand, Dubai, Italy, and the UK as well as most of the US and Canada.

venue: Lutron Jazz Cabaret Stage at Frank Banko Alehouse Cinemas
description: Alternative | Party/Cover | Rock Brian has loved string instruments since he was a small child, making his first guitar at age seven with a shoe box and rubber bands over an open shoe. He began studying cello at age nine, and learned guitar at age fourteen. By 9th grade, Brian fell in love with rock and roll. When his parents grounded him, due to chronic after-school detention, he was left without his newfound, beloved guitar. With optimistic defiance, he taught himself how to play the electric guitar parts on his cello. Brian makes his own arrangements to cover by popular artists, including Billy Joel, Frank Sinatra, System of a Down, Blink-182, Linkin Park and many more.  Brian also enjoys home music multi-track recording, and his latest single is called "Inside." He is working on several other original songs, including the bluesy "Love You Better," which has an impressive cello solo, a pop song called "Pretty Girl" and a ballad called "Twilight Sea."

Blues | Folk | Americana | R&B  A former mattress salesman and warehouse manager, Jeiris Cook took a leap of faith into full-time musicianship at the age of 37-with a young family by his side. After countless late nights spent honing his guitar skills, a 2017 camping trip with his son became the perfect stage to test his newfound talent.   How does one go from mattress sales to troubadour? As Cook puts it, "I'd always sing in situations when it wasn't deemed appropriate-at work, during meetings, even on conference calls. Eventually, I realized the universe was knocking me over the head, trying to tell me something."   Several years later, Cook has performed across the New York Metro area in venues, restaurants, private events, and showcases. He also volunteers with Musicians On Call, an organization that brings the healing power of live music to patients in healthcare facilities. Deeply committed to music's restorative potential, Cook considers this work among his most meaningful contributions to his craft.

Children's/Family | Indie | Puppetry Jumpin' Jamie plays "kindie rock" for all ages! From 2013-2019, Jumpin' Jamie was best known as the Dinosaur Troubadour at Field Station: Dinosaurs (Secaucus and Leonia, NJ), But with the release of their debut album, "Kookie," in 2018 the pop rocker dove headfirst into the kindie scene with a bold, confident, and undeniably fun collection. In 2020 and 2022, the follow up albums "Never Mind The Blocks, Here's Jumpin' Jamie" and "Mosaic" were released with the albums amassing over a half million streams on Spotify. Jamie has played thousands of shows nationally in 18 states (and counting!) at everything from birthday parties for a crowd of 12, to a stadium for crowds of 12,000 (Citi Field, NYC) and everything in between including Wizard World Comic Con (Chicago and Philadelphia), and Wolf Trap National Park for the Performing Arts (Virginia).

venue: The Guardian Life Insurance Company of America Zinzenplatz
description: Alternative | Indie | Pop Emerging from the vibrant music scene of South Jersey, Polaroid Fade burst out just over a year ago, though their musical journey began long before. Led by vocalist and songwriter Nicoletta, whose evocative vocals and reflective yet playful at times lyrics set the tone of the band's sound, which is a captivating blend of old-school new wave and contemporary alternative rock. Guitarist Tyler, with his years of multi-instrumental experience, weaves intricate melodies and infectious riffs. The rhythm section is seasoned with post punk riffs and grooves by Jeremy on bass and Jack on drums. Their music, described by Steve Feinberg (Good Charlotte, My Morning Jacket) as a fresh take on the old wave of new wave, transports listeners to the neon-lit streets of '80s Glasgow. Since the release of their debut single "Any Other Way" in 2022, Polaroid Fade has been steadily building a dedicated fanbase and making waves in the local scene with subsequent releases like "Bliss".

Blues | Oldies | Rock John DeRosa stands at the crossroads of blues and country music, fusing heartfelt storytelling with soulful melodies that resonate with audiences worldwide. With a career that spans years of dedication and passion, John has carved a niche for himself as a formidable musician whose influences range from legendary artists such as Gary Moore and B.B. King to the iconic Elvis Presley and Ricky Nelson.   Before establishing his solo career, John DeRosa was the lead guitar player for a multi-gold and platinum Nashville recording artist, where he honed his skills and developed a deep understanding of the music industry. This experience paved the way for his own success.   John DeRosa's unique blend of blues and country, combined with his rich musical heritage and unwavering dedication to his craft, promises fans and music lovers alike an unforgettable experience filled with passion, soul, and authenticity.

description: Celtic | Irish | Folk Allie Lua Murray is a fiery, fairy song weaver. All of nature and life is her muse. She has been writing and singing since she was a young girl and gathers her inspiration from personal experience, her Celtic ancestors, as well as the collective human soul. Her unique sound and lyrics are channeled through her soulful voice as well as instruments including the guitar, woodrow, ukulele, and drum. Allie's music honors all that it means to be alive, the joy and the grief and everything in between. Her music will surely touch your heart and stir the soul.

IT has played many events and festivals over the years including the largest free music festival in the country, Musikfest in starting back in 2016 and is proud to be returning in 2026. The band plays all types of great summertime music with a broad repertoire ranging from the Beach Boys, Beatles, Jimmy Buffett, Paul Simon, John Fogerty, Van Morrison, Zac Brown and the list goes on. A unique blend of acoustic, electric, percussion and humor. Island Time plays those special tunes that you would want to listen to on those lazy days of summer. Sit back, sing along, and enjoy!

Folk | Americana | Party/Cover | Street Performer  Solo guitar entertainer / Interactive Music with Comedy   Bil Krauss has been a performing entertainer in venues ranging from the rough and tumble streets of Canada and Europe to the class and prestige of North America's finest resorts for the last 40 years. A musician and solo-guitarist at heart, he is an entertainer's entertainer, with a quick-wit and playful style, backed up by superior musicianship and an enormous repertoire. description: Re-envisioning what pop can be in the 21st century, AJR unassumingly emerged as a ubiquitous hit-making outlier and one of the biggest indie bands in the world. Since 2012, the multi platinum indie pop trio—Adam [bass, vocals], Jack [vocals, guitar], and Ryan [ukulele, piano, vocals]—have generated billions of streams  and earned one triple-platinum single, one double-platinum single, four platinum singles, and one platinum album. 2019's Neotheater marked their biggest first-week debut, bowing at #8 on the Billboard Top 200, #1 on the Top Alternative Albums Chart, and #1 on the Top Rock Albums Chart. Cemented as part of the modern zeitgeist, Spotify touted “Sober Up” [feat. Rivers Cuomo] among the “Best Rock Songs of the 2010s,” while Apple Music included “Weak” on its  “Best Alt Songs of the 2010s.”  Not to mention, they remain one of the “500 Most-Listened to Artists”  on Spotify. On the heels of  Neotheater, they dropped the 2020 platinum blockbuster “BANG!”, which cracked the Top 10 at three radio formats, peaking at No. 6 on the Top 40 chart, No. 2 on Alternative radio and No. 1 on Adult Pop and marked their first Top 10 entry on the Billboard Hot 100. Their latest album, The Maybe Man [AJR Productions/Republic Records], was released in 2023. The title character is “a big sad superhero who is always questioning who he is” – Like a giant out of your favorite fairy tale), emotion hangs over his head, so it doesn't have to hang over yours. The group features various drumline style routines, choreographed percussion shows and even bagpipes. The group believes in empowering musicians and creating jaw-dropping live musical performances.      Orbital Drumline was founded in April of 2018 by a group of five friends. With a set of used drums we found on Facebook Marketplace and a dream, we set out to create an entertainment percussive experience like no other. description: Blues | Jazz | Latin Joe Baione is redefining the vibraphone's place in jazz. Inspired by legends like Lionel Hampton and Milt Jackson, Joe brings boundless energy, passion, and a vibrant voice to the tradition. Mentored by jazz icon Benny Golson, Joe has honed his artistry while honoring the roots of the genre.   After balancing a 27-year career as an instrumental music educator with local gigs, Joe returned full-time to the jazz scene, earning acclaim for his talent and innovation. His latest album, Vibe Check, features six originals and three compositions by his late father, performed alongside an all-star ensemble including Duane Eubanks, Toru Dodo, Jerome Jennings, and Marco Panascia.   From headlining international festivals to captivating audiences at Chris Jazz Cafe, Keystone Korner and Dizzy's Club to me a few, Joe's performances showcase his virtuosity and connection to jazz's roots. A passionate community advocate, Joe continues to inspire, ensuring the vibraphone's legacy shines brightly.

description: Alternative | Rock Meet Billy Bauer Band's Tribute to DMB   Fronted by singer-songwriter Billy Bauer, Billy Bauer Band brings a thoughtful and authentic tribute to the music of Dave Matthews Band.
